packageSummary:
**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Greece With 3 Nights Rhodes (Summer 2024)' package is an 11-day tour covering Athens, Mykonos, Santorini, Kalabaka, and Rhodes. The itinerary includes visits to the Acropolis, the Museum, Mykonos Island, Santorini, Meteora, and Rhodes, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ferry rides, and visits to historical sites and monuments.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Athens
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Athens: See the Acropolis and the Museum.

**Day 2:** Athens
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Athens: Visit the Acropolis and the Museum.
- Enjoy free time at Plaka.

**Day 3:** Mykonos
- Proceed to the Port of Athens to board the Ferry to Mykonos Island.
- Proceed on orientation tour of Mykonos: See the Panagia Paraportiani church and the monastery of Panagia Tourliani.

**Day 4:** Santorini
- Proceed to Mykonos port to take the High-Speed ferry to Santorini.
- Check-in to the hotel.
- Spend some free time at Kamari Beach, and then proceed to Fira, the beautiful capital of the island and the biggest and most cosmopolitan settlement of Santorini.

**Day 5:** Santorini
- Proceed on a half day Santorini island tour to the Center of the island and on the highest point where you will visit the hidden gems of the area.
- See the charming Megalochori village, a labyrinth of winding alleys, whitewashed houses, and blue-domed churches with ornate bell towers.
- Visit the 16th century Monastery of Prophet Elias which was built on the highest point of the Island 567 meters above sea level, from where you will have a panoramic view of the whole island village of Pyrgos.

**Day 6:** Kalabaka
- Transfer to Santorini airport to take morning flight to Athens.
- Arrive into Athens and proceed to Delphi.
- Visit the Delphi Archaeological site and Museum.
- Proceed to Kalabaka.

**Day 7:** Athens
- Proceed to Meteora.
- Visit 2 of the 14th-century ethereal monasteries, situated above the unique and dramatic landscape of naturally formed high rocks.
- Drive back to Athens.

**Day 8:** Rhodes
- Fly to Rhodes.
- On Arrival at Diagoras airport, we depart for a unique exploration in Rhodes, the island of the Knights.
- Discover the long history, culture rich collection of historical sites and monuments that represent Greek history and are worth visiting.
- Visit the Grand Master's Palace, and continue our tour with the New Marina, Monte Smith Hill with the Citadel of the Ancient City of Rhodes, the Temple of God Apollo, the Ancient Theatre and the Ancient Stadium.
- Visit the Museum of Neo-Hellenic Art (Nestorideion) and our tour ends with a visit to the Throne of Helios.

**Day 9:** Rhodes
- Sail to Simi – one of the most beautiful Venetian Island with its unique architecture.
- See the traditional houses built next to each other on the steep hillsides.
- Walk through the alleys and visit the sponge shops.
- Next, we stop at port Panormitis – a pilgrimage site where you see the 15th Century Holy Monastery of Taxiarchis of Panormitis with its wonderful frescoes, the library, the folklore museum inside and an impressive wood-carved iconostasis.
- The facade is dominated by the baroque bell tower, which is one of the highest in the world.

**Day 10:** Rhodes
- Enjoy the magic of Rhodes from the water as we experience a thrilling ride on board a Submarine and see the most famous and beautiful places in the City of Rhodes including best-known sights where Colossus of Rhodes stood.
- Next, we proceed to the thermal springs of Kallithea - picturesque bay in a landscape of unique natural beauty.
- Later, we visit the Holy Monastery of Panagia Tsampikas with the unique breathtaking view.
- Next we visit a uniquely beautiful settlement of Lindos.
- The Acropolis of Lindos, built on a steep rock 116 meters high, dominates over the traditional settlement with its picturesque alleys, buildings of special architecture.
- We then visit Virgin of Lindos where you see the most stunning frescos.
- Later, stroll around to discover the beauties of the place as well as the local cafes and restaurants.

**Day 11:** Rhodes
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Spain and Portugal - Summer 2024' package is a 12-day tour covering Madrid, Porto, Lisbon, Seville, Costa Del Sol, Granada, Valencia, and Barcelona. The itinerary includes visits to the Bullring, Mezquita, Fatima, Flamenco show, Sagrada Familia, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, horse carriage rides, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Madrid
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Madrid: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Madrid
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Madrid: Visit a Bullring – Guided city tour of Toledo – Visit a Sword factory
- Enjoy a guided tour of Toledo: See the cathedral of Toledo, Puente San Martin, important squares and narrow winding cobblestone streets.

**Day 3:** Porto
- Drive to Salamanca and enjoy an Orientation of Salamanca.
- Continue our journey to Porto in Lisbon.

**Day 4:** Lisbon
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Porto: World-famous for its port wine, Porto is Portugal's second largest city.
- Proceed to Fatima, one of the most important pilgrimage sites in the world.
- Visit the Fatima Shrine - the Basilica and Chapel of the Apparitions.

**Day 5:** Lisbon
- Enjoy a guided city tour of Lisbon: See the Plaza Reina, the stunning Cathedral, the central market and more.
- Visit the City of Arts & Sciences, one of the more recent architectural landmarks of Valencia.

**Day 6:** Seville
- Drive to Sevilla situated on the banks of the River Guadalquivir.
- Enjoy a Guided city tour of Sevilla: See the Sevilla cathedral and Plaza Espana.
- Take a horse carriage ride and enjoy the traditional Flamenco show.

**Day 7:** Costa Del Sol
- Drive to Cordoba and visit Mezquita.
- Visit Puerto Banus.

**Day 8:** Granada
- Drive to Granada and on arrival enjoy guided tour of the Alhambra Complex and Gneralife Gardens.
- Overnight in Granada, Spain.

**Day 9:** Valencia
- Drive to Valencia and enjoy a guided city tour: See the Plaza Reina, the stunning Cathedral, the central market and more.
- Visit the City of Arts & Sciences, one of the more recent architectural landmarks of Valencia.

**Day 10:** Barcelona
- Drive to Barcelona and enjoy a guided city tour: See the Olympic Village, Montjuic, Placa de Catalunya, and many more beautiful sights.
- Visit the Sagrada Familia - the yet unfinished minor basilica, a UNESCO World Heritage site.

**Day 11:** Barcelona
- Drive to Montserrat – a multi peaked rocky range which houses the virgin of Montserrat and Spain’s first national park.
- Spend some free time at La Rambla - the famous tree-lined central avenue of Barcelona with cafes and souvenir shops.
- Spend some free time at Barcelona beach.

**Day 12:** Barcelona
- Proceed to Barcelona airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Greece (Summer 2024)' package is an 8-day tour covering Athens, Mykonos, Santorini, and Kalabaka. The itinerary includes visits to the Acropolis, the Museum, Mykonos Island, the Panagia Paraportiani church, the monastery of Panagia Tourliani, Santorini Island, the 9D Atlantis Show and Museum, and the traditional village of Oia, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ferry rides, and visits to local markets and beaches.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Athens
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Athens: See the Acropolis and the Museum.

**Day 2:** Athens
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Athens: Visit the Panathinaikon Stadium, the Catholic Cathedral, the Academy, University, and National Library.
- Enjoy free time at Plaka.

**Day 3:** Mykonos
- Drive to Mykonos Island – the most famous Greek island and one of the world’s most popular holiday resorts.
- Proceed on an orientation tour of Mykonos: See the Panagia Paraportiani church and the monastery of Panagia Tourliani.
- Evening is free to explore beautiful beaches, and a spectacular sunset on own.

**Day 4:** Santorini
- Drive to Santorini Island.
- Check-in to the hotel.
- Spend some free time at Kamari Beach, and then proceed to Fira, the beautiful capital of the island and the biggest and most cosmopolitan settlement of Santorini.
- Enjoy a walking tour followed by some free time at Fira.

**Day 5:** Santorini
- Proceed on a half day Santorini Island tour to the Center of the island and on the highest point where you will visit the hidden gems of the area.
- See the charming Megalochori village, a labyrinth of winding alleys, whitewashed houses, and blue-domed churches with ornate bell towers.
- Visit the 16th century Monastery of Prophet Elias which was built on the highest point of the Island 567 meters above sea level, from where you will have a panoramic view of the whole island village of Pyrgos.
- Next stop will be the traditional village of Oia which is on the northern tip of the island, high on the cliff top.

**Day 6:** Kalabaka
- Drive to Kalabaka.
- Visit the Delphi Archaeological site and Museum.
- Proceed to Kalabaka.

**Day 7:** Athens
- Drive to Meteora.
- Visit 2 of the 14th-century ethereal monasteries, situated above the unique and dramatic landscape of naturally formed high rocks.
- Drive back to Athens.

**Day 8:** Athens
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'European Express With 3 Nights Mediterranean Cruise (Summer 2024)' package is a 16-day tour covering Paris, Brussels, Netherlands, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, Italy, and the Mediterranean Cruise. The itinerary includes visits to the Eiffel Tower, Versailles Palace, Cologne Cathedral, Black Forest, Rhine Falls, Jungfraujoch, Mt. Titlis, and the Leaning Tower of Pisa, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Paris
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Paris: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Paris
- Proceed for a Guided Tour of Versailles Palace with private apartments, Opera Hall, the Chapel & Hall of Mirrors.
- Visit the Eiffel Tower 2nd level.
- Guided City Tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Invalides and Champs Elysees.

**Day 3:** Brussels
- Drive to Brussels for an Orientation Tour of Brussels: See the Grand Place with free time and photo stop at the Manneken Pis statue.
- Photo Stop at Atomium.

**Day 4:** Netherlands
- Proceed to Keukenhof – the largest Spring Garden in the World.
- Visit a Cheese Farm & Wooden Shoe Factory.
- Visit the famous Dam Square: see the Royal Palace, Nieuwe Kerk & the War Memorial.

**Day 5:** Germany
- Drive to Cologne & Visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a Scenic Cruise on the River Rhine.

**Day 6:** Switzerland
- Drive to the heart of the Black Forest, to enjoy the dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- Visit the Rhine Falls.

**Day 7:** Switzerland
- Day at leisure OR Excursion to Jungfraujoch with lunch & Interlaken (Optional).
- Visit Mt. Titlis. Our cable car ride includes the world’s first rotating cable car, the Rotair – to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters.

**Day 8:** Switzerland
- Visit the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke with some free time to shop for famous Swiss watches, knives and chocolates.

**Day 9:** Innsbruck
- Drive to Innsbruck. On arrival, we visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop.
- Enjoy an Orientation Tour: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse.

**Day 10:** Padova
- Drive to Italy & proceed to the pier to take a boat to Venice.
- Visit St. Mark’s Square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile and Bridge of Sighs.

**Day 11:** Arezzo
- Proceed to Florence for a Guided walking Tour: see the Duomo, the Campanile, Baptistry with its Gates to the Paradise & Piazza Della Signoria.
- Drive to Rome.

**Day 12:** Arezzo
- Day trip to Rome: Guided tour of Vatican – Guided city tour of Rome.
- Enter the Vatican City – the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed. Visit the holy Basilica of St. Peter’s and the St. Peter’s Square.

**Day 13:** Rome
- Proceed to Pisa. On arrival, we visit the Square of Miracles to see the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa.
- Drive to proceed to Savona to board the Cruise.

**Day 14:** Mediterranean Cruise
- Arrive in Barcelona. After breakfast, you can enjoy the on-board amenities such as swimming pool, jacuzzi, gaming zone OR proceed for sightseeing in Barcelona, with our recommended shore excursions.

**Day 15:** Mediterranean Cruise
- Arrive in Marseilles. After breakfast, you can enjoy the on-board amenities such as swimming pool, jacuzzi, gaming zone OR proceed for sightseeing in Marseilles, with our recommended shore excursions.

**Day 16:** Mediterranean Cruise
- Arrive in Savona. After breakfast or brunch, disembark and proceed to Milan Airport for your return Journey.

**Summary:** The 'Scenic Scandinavia with Iceland (Summer 2024)' package is a 14-day tour covering Helsinki, Finland, Tallinn, Estonia, Stockholm, Sweden, Oslo, Norway, Bergen, Norway, Copenhagen, Denmark, and Reykjavik, Iceland. The itinerary includes visits to Toompea Hill, Parliament building, Dome Church, St. Nicholas Church, Town Hall Square, Alexander Nevsky Cathedral, Senate Square, Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, Sibelius Park, Fazer experience center, Vasa Museum, Stockholm Concert Hall, Gamla Stan, Little Mermaid statue, Oresund Bridge, Holmenkollen Ski Jump, Fram Museum, Vigeland Sculpture Park, Thingvellir national park, Geysir, Gullfoss waterfall, Seljalandsfoss, Skogafoss waterfalls, Black Sand Beach, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ferry rides, train rides, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Helsinki
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Helsinki: See the Senate Square, visit Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, Sibelius Park and many more interesting sights.

**Day 2:** Guided city tour of Tallinn
- Drive to the pier to take a ferry to Tallinn, Estonia's capital on the Baltic Sea.
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Tallinn: See the Toompea Hill, Parliament building, Dome Church, St. Nicholas Church, Town Hall Square.
- Next, we see the Alexander Nevsky Cathedral.
- Later, we drive to the pier to take the ferry back to Helsinki.

**Day 3:** Guided city tour of Helsinki – Board Cruise to Stockholm
- Proceed on a guided city tour of Helsinki: See the Senate Square, visit Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, Sibelius Park and many more interesting sights.
- Next, Visit Fazer experience center and learn the art of chocolate making including chocolate tasting.
- Later, we board the cruise across the Baltic Sea to Stockholm.

**Day 4:** Guided city tour of Stockholm – Visit famous Vasa Museum
- Proceed on a guided city tour of Stockholm: See the Opera House, Alfred Nobel's House and the Royal Palace.
- Also, we visit the Stockholm Concert Hall - venue of the Nobel Prize award.
- Next, we visit Vasa Museum - Sweden's most visited museum enshrining the warship, Vasa.
- Later, we spend some free time in Gamla Stan – the old Town.

**Day 5:** Onto Oslo – Visit the town of Karlstad
- Drive to Oslo. Enroute, we visit the town of Karlstad, situated on the northern shores of Lake Vanern, for a photo stop at Lake Vanern – the largest lake of Sweden.

**Day 6:** Guided Tour of Oslo – Visit Fram Museum – Photostop at Holmenkollen Ski Jump
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Oslo: See the Parliament Square, National Galleries, Karl Johan shopping street, the Royal Palace and Akhershus Fortress.
- Next, we visit Vigeland Sculpture Park and the Fram Museum, learn the story of Norwegian polar exploration.
- Later we take a Photostop at Holmenkollen Ski Jump.

**Day 7:** Travel on one of Norway’s most popular trips ‘Norway in a nutshell’
- Drive to Geilo station. Board our train to Myrdal, change to the Flam railway line, for a scenic travel to Flam.
- We wander around the idyllic countryside, before embarking on a boat ride through the Aurlandsfjord into the Naeroyfjord, one of the narrowest fjords in Europe, surrounded by mountains of up to 1800 meters.
- On arrival at scenic Gudvangen, we board the coach and travel through the impressive Norwegian landscape to Bergen.

**Day 8:** Guided city tour of Bergen – Ride on the Funicular train – Fly to Copenhagen
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Bergen: See the Hanseatic wharf Bryggen with its pastel – coloured wooden houses, winding cobblestone streets and old Bergen.
- Next, we take a ride on the Funicular train, to the top of the Mount Floyen for an aerial view of Bergen.
- Later, we fly to Copenhagen.

**Day 9:** Guided City Tour of Copenhagen - Canal Cruise - Oresund Bridge
- Proceed for a guided City Tour of Copenhagen: See the Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue and many other interesting sights.
- Next, we drive on the Oresund Bridge which is the second longest bridge in Europe with both roadway and railway combined in a single structure, running nearly 8 kilometres.

**Day 10:** Copenhagen - Fly to Reykjavik, Iceland – Orientation Tour of Reykjavik
- Check out and proceed to take a flight to Rekjavik. On arrival, Proceed to hotel and Check-in.
- Later you proceed for an Orientation Tour of Reykjavik where we see Hallgrimskirkja (Church), Rainbow Street and many more interesting sites.

**Day 11:** Golden Circle tour (Thingvellir – Geysir – Gullfoss)
- Proceed for a Golden Circle Tour where we first Visit the Thingvellier national park.
- Here, we walk through the rift valley. This is the only place in the world where separation between the North American and European geological rift (tectonic plates) are above sea level, and nowhere in the world are the edges of both plates as clearly visible than the rift valley in Thingvellir National Park.
- Here, you can stand on two continents at the same time!
- Then, we proceed to Visit the Geysir where we take a Stop at the hot springs.
- Later, we see the famous Gullfoss waterfall and take a few pictures.

**Day 12:** South Island Tour (Visit Seljalandsfoss - Skogafoss waterfalls – Photo stop at Plane Wreck – Photo stop at Black Sand Beach)
- Take a scenic drive to South Island where we first stop at Seljalandsfoss and Skogafoss.
- Take photos of the waterfall where you see the maximum rainbows at once.
- These were the locations of one of the famous Bollywood song.
- Seljalandsfoss cascades over steep cliffs, which make it possible for people to walk behind the waterfall, offering a spectacular view of the waterfall itself and the surroundings.
- Skogafoss stands at 60 meters tall.
- Later, proceed to take a photo-stop at the Black Sand beach and we Visit the Iconic plane wreck site.

**Day 13:** Proceed to Helsinki 
- Today, you can spend some leisure time exploring the city.
- Later we proceed to the airport to board a flight to Helsinki. On arrival at Helsinki, we drive to the hotel and Check in.

**Day 14:** Fly back home with pleasant memories!
- Today, we proceed to the airport for your flight back home.
- Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager.
- Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated.
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Enchanting East Europe With 4 Nights Balkans (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering Berlin, Prague, Krakow, Vienna, Budapest, Zagreb, Ljubljana, and Salzburg. The itinerary includes visits to Berlin Wall, Alexander Platz, Topography of Terror Museum, Cesky Krumlov Castle, Prague Castle, St. Vitus Cathedral, Golden Lane, Historic Tram Experience, Wieliczka Salt mines, Schonbrunn Palace, Visegrad Castle, Palinka Factory, Hungarian Horsemanship show, and Danube River Cruise, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city sightseeing, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Berlin
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Berlin: See the Berlin Wall, Alexander Platz, and Topography of Terror Museum.

**Day 2:** Berlin
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Berlin: Visit the famous Berlin Wall, the Reichstag, and the World Time Clock.
- Free time to explore the city on own.

**Day 3:** Prague
- Drive to Dresden for a guided city tour.
- Drive to Prague – the city of hundred spires, built at the meandering Vltava River.
- Visit the Old Town Square, take a photo stop at the Astronomical Clock.
- Walk over the most visited Charles Bridge.

**Day 4:** Prague
- Proceed for a walking guided city tour of Prague: Visit the Prague Castle, its courtyards and St. Vitus Cathedral from inside.
- Walk through the Golden Lane and see the house where Franz Kafka, the famous Czech writer stayed.
- Experience Prague through a historic Tram ride.

**Day 5:** Krakow
- Drive to Olomouc.
- Located on the Moravia River, this town is famous for its adoring square and fountains.
- Continue our journey to Poland with a scenic drive to Krakow.

**Day 6:** Krakow
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Krakow: the medieval town centre, the Main Market square, the Renaissance Cloth Hall, see twin-towered St Mary’s Church and Wawel Hill with its great Castle and Cathedral.
- Enjoy a horse carriage ride in the old town.
- Proceed for a guided tour of the Auschwitz Concentration Camp of WW II.

**Day 7:** Vienna
- Drive to Wieliczka Salt mines – one of the oldest in Europe and a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site.
- Drive to Vienna – the city of art and architecture.

**Day 8:** Budapest
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Vienna: See the magnificent Opera House, Rathaus, Parliament building, Hofburg Palace and many more interesting monuments.
- Visit the famous Schonbrunn Palace - a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site and experience the grand tour.
- Drive to Budapest.

**Day 9:** Budapest
- Proceed to visit the Visegrad Castle located on the banks of river Danube with breath taking views of the river.
- Experience the Knight tournament and learn about the ways of the medieval age.
- Visit the Palinka factory. Palinka, a Hungarian fruit brandy, is a strong alcoholic beverage appreciated for its potency, flavour and fragrance.

**Day 10:** Budapest
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Budapest: Visit the Citadel, Fisherman’s Bastion Heroes Square, see the Chain Bridge that connects the cities of Buda and Pest.
- Enjoy a show of Hungarian Horsemanship.
- Enjoy a farewell dinner on board the Danube river cruise.

**Day 11:** Zagreb
- Drive to Zagreb for a guided city tour of this vibrant Croatian capital.
- See Vukovar Avenue with the Lisinski concert Hall, The Museum of Contemporary Arts, Zagreb Cathedral and the rest of Zagreb built in the socialistic era.

**Day 12:** Zagreb
- Visit Plitvice Lakes National Park, one of the oldest national parks in Southeast Europe and the largest national park in Croatia, with a chain of 16 terraced lakes, joined by waterfalls.
- Free time to explore the city on your own.

**Day 13:** Ljubljana
- Drive to Ljubljana for Orientation Tour – see the Town hall, Ljubljana castle and the historical city centre.
- Visit the Postojna cave, the best-known cave in the world, with a Double Track Railway.

**Day 14:** Salzburg
- Drive to Bled. On arrival, take a boat ride to the Bled Church.
- Head to Salzburg for a guided walking tour of the city of Mozart and sound of Music.

**Day 15:** Salzburg
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Europe (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering London, Paris, Belgium, Netherlands, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, and Italy. The itinerary includes visits to famous landmarks such as Buckingham Palace, Eiffel Tower, Atomium, Keukenhof, and the Leaning Tower of Pisa, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside London Airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided city tour of London: See the Buckingham Palace, Changing of King’s Guard, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge, and Thames River.

**Day 2:** London
- Proceed on a guided city tour of London: Visit Madame Tussauds wax museum and ride on the London Eye.
- Enjoy a guided city tour of London: See the famous Manneken Pis statue and visit the Grand Place.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Drive to Calais by the Le Shuttle / Ferry and onwards drive to Paris.
- Guided Tour of Versailles: See the private apartments, Opera Hall, the Chapel & Hall of Mirrors.
- Visit the Eiffel Tower 2nd level.

**Day 4:** Paris
- Proceed for a Guided City Tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Invalides, and Champs Elysees.
- Enjoy a cruise on the Seine River along with an ‘Illumination Tour of Paris’ and see Paris by night, with some of the City’s famous monuments / sights lit up (Optional).

**Day 5:** Belgium
- Drive to Brussels for an Orientation Tour of Brussels: Enjoy free time at Grand Place with and see the famous Manneken Pis statue.
- Photo Stop at Atomium.

**Day 6:** Belgium
- Proceed to Keukenhof – the largest Spring Garden in the World.
- Enjoy a cruise on the canals of Amsterdam in a glass topped boat.

**Day 7:** Germany
- Drive to Cologne & visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on the river Rhine.

**Day 8:** Switzerland
- Drive to the heart of the Black Forest, to enjoy the dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- Visit the Rhine Falls.

**Day 9:** Switzerland
- Proceed to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.

**Day 10:** Switzerland
- Visit Mt Titlis.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on Lake Lucerne.

**Day 11:** Austria
- Drive to Innsbruck.
- Enjoy an Orientation Tour: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse.

**Day 12:** Italy
- Drive to Italy & proceed to the pier to take a private boat to Venice.
- Visit St. Mark’s Square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile, and Bridge of Sighs.

**Day 13:** Italy
- Proceed to Florence for a Guided walking Tour: see the Duomo, the Campanile, Baptistry with its Gates to the Paradise & Piazza Della Signoria.
- Visit the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa.

**Day 14:** Italy
- Go on a day trip to Rome.
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Vatican & Rome: Enter the Vatican City – the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed. Visit the holy Basilica of St. Peter’s and the St. Peter’s Square.

**Day 15:** Italy
- Depart to Milan airport for your flight back home with Pleasant Memories!

**Summary:** The 'Swiss French Magic (Summer 2024)' package is an 8-day tour covering Paris, Geneva, Leysin, and Zurich. The itinerary includes visits to Eiffel Tower, Disneyland Paris, Geneva's famous fountain, the Floral Clock, Glacier 3000, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Paris
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Paris: See the Opera House, Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, and more.

**Day 2:** Paris
- Visit the Eiffel Tower (2nd level).
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, and Les Invalides.
- Visit the Famous French perfume museum – Fragonard.
- Enjoy a cruise on the Seine River along with an ‘Illumination Tour of Paris’ and see Paris by night, with some of the city’s famous monuments / sights lit up.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Proceed to Disneyland Paris where you can visit Disneyland Park OR Walt Disney Studios Park (Up to 5 Hour Visit).
- Get charmed by Sleeping Beauty Castle, enjoy exciting rollercoaster rides, meet Alice in Wonderland, Pinocchio and others in Fantasyland as well as travelling to the four corners of the globe in Adventure Land.

**Day 4:** Geneva
- Drive to Geneva in Switzerland.
- Enjoy an orientation tour: see the Palais des Nations - the European arm of the United Nations.
- See the Jet d’eau - Geneva’s famous fountain, the Floral Clock.

**Day 5:** Leysin
- Go on an excursion to Glacier 3000.
- Enjoy breath-taking views of the iconic mountains such as Mont-Blanc, the Matterhorn, Eiger, Monch and Jungfrau from the Tissot Peak Walk.
- Enjoy an Orientation Tour of Saanen & Gstaad - a shooting location for Indian films.
- Board the scenic Golden Pass train and enjoy panoramic views as we journey through alpine forest and picturesque villages.
- Enjoy an Orientation Tour of Montreux.

**Day 6:** Zurich
- Check-out and proceed to Lucerne.
- Enjoy an orientation tour: See the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke with some free time to shop for famous Swiss watches, knives and chocolates.
- Enjoy a Cruise on Lake Lucerne.
- Visit Lindt, Home of Chocolate where you see the process of making Swiss Chocolates.

**Day 7:** Zurich
- Day at leisure OR visit Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe.
- Take the cable car followed by a cogwheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.
- Enjoy lunch on Top.
- Visit Interlaken.

**Day 8:** Zurich

**Summary:** The 'Beautiful Vietnam' package is a 9-day tour covering Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, Saigon, and Phu Quoc Island. The itinerary includes visits to Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature, Hoan Kiem Lake, Old Quarter, Vinpearl Safari, VinWonders Theme Park, and Island Hopping By Canoe & Cable Car, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to local markets and villages.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Hanoi arrival – City Tour
- Welcome to Hanoi, the capital of Vietnam.
- Visit Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature, and Hoan Kiem Lake.
- Explore the Old Quarter of Hanoi, a fascinating network of narrow alleys and shophouses.

**Day 2:** Hanoi – Halong bay – Overnight on cruise
- Drive to Ha Long Bay, the pride of the Gulf of Tonkin.
- Enjoy a warm welcome from cruise staff and complete the check-in procedure for the overnight cruise.
- Visit the Grottos, stop for swimming or kayaking, pass floating houses, and approach islets to enjoy their beauty in close proximity.

**Day 3:** Halong Bay – Hanoi – Saigon (Air fare is not Included)
- Wake up early to enjoy the dawn on the sea in the early morning.
- Visit the magnificent beauty of this "Descending Dragon" bay, created by thousands of odd-shaped limestone rocks and karst grottoes.
- Disembark from the cruise, return to Hanoi by shuttle bus, and transfer to Noi Bai airport for your flight to Ho Chi Minh city.

**Day 4:** Saigon City tour – Cu Chi Tunnels – (SIC Basis)
- Visit Independence Palace, also known at the Reunification palace.
- Explore the War Remnants Museum, one of the most famous historical attractions in Saigon.
- Visit Cu Chi Tunnels, the network of over 200 km of tunnels became legendary when they played a vital role in the war.

**Day 5:** Ho Chi Minh – Mekong Delta – My Tho – Ho Chi Minh (B, L) – SIC Basis
- Drive to My Tho, the town lies on the left side of the Mekong River.
- Visit Vinh Trang pagoda, which dated back to the late 19th century.
- Enjoy a boat cruise around the four beautiful islands known as Dragon, Unicorn, Phoenix and Tortoise islands.

**Day 6:** Sai Gon - Phu Quoc Island (PVT Basis) – (Air Fare is not Included)
- Fly to Phu Quoc Island.
- Check in at hotel and rest of the day leisure.

**Day 7:** Phu Quoc - Vinpearl Safari – Vin wonders Theme Park
- Visit Vinpearl Safari Phu Quoc, the largest wildlife conservation park in Vietnam.
- Explore the VinWonders Phu Quoc, the largest theme park in Vietnam.

**Day 8:** Phu Quoc – Island Hopping By Canoe & Cable Car – (SIC Basis)
- Visit Mong Tay Island, known as the miniature Maldives of Vietnam.
- Relax in the blue water, snorkel on the coral reefs, contemplate the interesting rock formations.
- Enjoy lunch on the island restaurant.

**Day 9:** Phu Quoc Departure (PVT Basis)
- Check out from hotel and transfer to the airport for your return flight.

**Summary:** The 'Best Of East and West Europe (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering Paris, Leysin, Zurich, Innsbruck, Salzburg, Prague, Budapest, and Vienna. The itinerary includes visits to Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Disneyland Paris, Geneva, Glacier 3000, Lucerne, Harder Kulm, Jungfraujoch, Innsbruck, Salzburg, Cesky Krumlov, Prague Castle, Old Town, Bratislava, Budapest, and Vienna. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Danube cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Paris
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Paris: See the Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, and more.

**Day 2:** Paris
- Visit the Eiffel Tower (2nd level).
- Visit the Louvre Museum to see the world-famous Mona Lisa painting.
- Proceed for a guided tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, and Les Invalides.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Proceed to Disneyland Paris where you can visit Disneyland Park OR Walt Disney Studios Park (Up to 5 Hours visit).
- Get charmed by Sleeping Beauty Castle, enjoy exciting rollercoaster rides, meet Alice in Wonderland, Pinocchio, and others in Fantasyland.

**Day 4:** Leysin
- Drive to Geneva in Switzerland.
- Enjoy an orientation tour of Geneva: See the Palais des Nations, Jet d’eau, and the Floral Clock.

**Day 5:** Leysin
- Go on an excursion to Glacier 3000.
- Enjoy breathtaking views of the iconic mountains such as Mont-Blanc, the Matterhorn, Eiger, Monch, and Jungfrau from the Tissot Peak Walk.
- Visit the Maison Cailler chocolate factory to see the art of making world-famous Swiss chocolates.

**Day 6:** Zurich
- Drive to Interlaken and visit Harder Kulm.
- Enjoy a funicular ride to the top from where you will get panoramic views of Interlaken nestled between Lake Thun and Lake Brienz.
- Visit Lucerne and enjoy an orientation tour: See the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke.

**Day 7:** Zurich
- Proceed to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe.
- Take the cable car followed by a cogwheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.

**Day 8:** Innsbruck
- Drive to Wattens and visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop.
- See artifacts made with Swarovski crystals and have an opportunity to shop.
- Enjoy an orientation tour of Innsbruck: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse.

**Day 9:** Salzburg
- Visit the Hallein Salt Mine - the oldest in the world.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the salt mines.
- Proceed to Salzburg for a guided walking tour of the city of Mozart and the ‘Sound of Music’.

**Day 10:** Prague
- Proceed to Cesky Krumlov - a tourist town in the South Bohemian Region of the Czech Republic.
- Enjoy a guided tour in the town’s historic center with the Cesky Krumlov Castle complex.
- Drive to Prague - the city of a hundred spires, built on the meandering Vltava River.

**Day 11:** Prague
- Proceed for a walking guided city tour of Prague: Visit the Prague Castle, its courtyards, and St. Vitus Cathedral from inside.
- Walk through the Golden Lane and see the house where Franz Kafka, the famous Czech writer stayed between 1916 and 1917.
- Visit the Old Town. Take a photo-stop at the Astronomical Clock - the oldest Functional Astronomical clock in the world.

**Day 12:** Budapest
- Drive to Bratislava – the capital city of Slovakia.
- Enjoy an orientation tour of the city on mini train ride.
- Drive to Budapest. On arrival, enjoy a cruise on the Danube River – the 2nd longest river of Europe.

**Day 13:** Budapest
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Budapest: Visit the Citadel, Fisherman’s Bastion, Heroes Square, and see the Chain Bridge that connects the cities of Buda and Pest.
- Enjoy a show of Hungarian Horsemanship.
- Enjoy some free time for shopping at the famous street of central Budapest - Vaci Utca.

**Day 14:** Vienna
- Drive to Vienna. On arrival, enjoy a guided tour of Vienna: See the magnificent Opera House, Rathaus, Parliament building, Hofburg Palace, and many more interesting monuments.
- Visit the famous Schonbrunn Palace - a UNESCO World Cultural Heritage site.
- Enjoy some free time for shopping at the longest shopping street of Vienna – Maria Hilfer Strasse.

**Day 15:** Fly back home with pleasant memories!
- Proceed to Vienna airport for your flight back home. Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Canadian Delights (Summer 2024)' package is a 13-day tour covering Toronto, Niagara Falls, Ottawa, Montreal, Canmore, Hinton, Kamloops, Whistler, and Vancouver. The itinerary includes visits to CN Tower, Niagara Falls, 1000 Islands Cruise, Parliament Hill, Butchart Gardens, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Toronto
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Toronto: See the City Hall, Queens Park, Chinatown, and the University of Toronto.

**Day 2:** Niagara Falls
- Drive to Niagara Falls and visit the CN Tower Observatory.
- Ride aboard the ‘Hornblower’ Cruise to get a close-up experience of the magnificent Niagara Falls.
- Visit the Skylon Tower Observatory.

**Day 3:** Ottawa
- Drive to Ottawa and visit the Parliament Hill, residence of the Prime Minister.
- Rideau Canal and many more sites on the orientation tour of Ottawa.

**Day 4:** Montreal
- Drive to Montreal and visit Mount Royal Park, and drive around Old Port, St. Joseph Oratory, Notre Dame Basilica, and many more sites.
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Montreal.

**Day 5:** Quebec
- Proceed on our full-day excursion to Quebec City.
- On our guided tour, we drive through the Upper and Lower Towns and see the Parliament Buildings, the Plains of Abraham, the Citadel, Chateau Frontenac, the Place d’Armes, and Quebec National Assembly.

**Day 6:** Canmore
- Drive to Banff National Park - Canada’s oldest national park, nestled amid the Canadian Rocky Mountains.
- Enroute Feel the fresh mountain air, watch for wildlife and get adventurous on Banff's largest lake. Lake Minnewanka is one of Banff’s most popular destinations.

**Day 7:** Canmore
- See more of Banff National Park, taking a bus tour through the towering mountains of Rundle, Tunnel, Cascade, and Norquay.
- Visit the beautiful Bow Falls a major waterfall on the Bow River.

**Day 8:** Hinton
- Drive to Icefields Parkway, one of the world’s most scenic mountain drives, through the natural splendor of Banff and Jasper national parks.
- Ice fields Parkway is one of the largest non-polar ice fields in the world.

**Day 9:** Kamloops
- Drive to Jasper National Park by travelling along the trails of the early explorers and viewing the park’s unspoiled grandeur.
- Visit Maligne Canyon, created by over 10,000 years of water erosion.

**Day 10:** Whistler
- Drive to Whistler, one of the largest ski resorts in North America and 2010 Vancouver winter Olympics venue.
- Take a ride on the breathtaking ‘Peak 2 Peak’ Gondola, a 4.4-kilometre world record-breaking journey provides an unparalleled perspective of British Columbia's rooftop and incomparable views of towering volcanic peaks, coastal rainforests, and ancient glaciers.

**Day 11:** Vancouver
- Drive to Vancouver, en route stop by to view the Shannon falls.
- Visit the Capilano Suspension Bridge & Park.
- Guided City Tour of Vancouver: Visit Stanley Park, Canada Place, and view the famous steam clock while driving through historic Gastown.

**Day 12:** Vancouver
- Board the British Columbia Ferry and sail through the Active Pass and Gulfs Islands to Victoria.
- Visit the beautiful Butchart Gardens, the 55 acres of beautiful garden haven, overflowing with lush greens and colourful blooms.

**Day 13:** Vancouver
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Best Of Ladakh With Hanle & Tsomoriri' package is a 9-day tour covering Leh, Nubra Valley, Pangong Lake, Hanle, and Tsomoriri. **Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Leh
- Arrive at Leh Airport and receive assistance from our representative.
- Transfer to hotel and rest to acclimatize to the high altitude.
- Dinner and overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 2:** Leh
- Visit Spituk, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, Sangam, and Shanti Stupa.
- Return to hotel and rest.
- Dinner and overnight stay at hotel.

**Day 3:** Nubra Valley

- Visit Diskit Monastery and enjoy an ATV ride.
- Dinner and overnight stay at hotel/camp.

**Day 4:** Nubra Valley

- Dinner and overnight stay at hotel/camp.

**Day 5:** Pangong Lake

- Dinner and overnight stay at guest house.

**Day 7:** Tsomoriri

- Visit the lake and explore the surrounding area.
- Dinner and overnight stay at hotel/camp.

**Day 8:** Leh

**Summary:** The 'Grand Bargain America with Orlando (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering San Francisco, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Niagara Falls, Harrisburg, Washington D.C., New Jersey, and Orlando. The itinerary includes visits to the Golden Gate Bridge, Universal Studios, the Las Vegas High Roller, the Statue of Liberty, the Kennedy Space Centre, and Walt Disney World, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city sightseeing, and visits to iconic landmarks and theme parks.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to San Francisco

**Day 2:** San Francisco

- Visit Sausalito, the most well-known waterfront community in California.

**Day 3:** Los Angeles
- Drive to Los Angeles and visit Solvang - "A little Denmark in Southern California".
- Visit the Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches.

**Day 4:** Los Angeles
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Los Angeles: Visit Universal Studios and enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more.
- Experience the ‘Wizarding World of Harry Potter’.

**Day 5:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas and visit the Las Vegas High Roller.
- Explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas

- Visit the Fremont Street Experience - a dazzling display on the world’s largest TV screen with over a million light bulbs covering three city blocks!

**Day 7:** Niagara Falls
- Fly to Buffalo and drive to Niagara and check in at the hotel.
- Visit Niagara Falls by night.

**Day 8:** Niagara Falls
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Niagara Falls: Visit the Maid of the Mist.
- Take a boat ride aboard the Maid of The Mist, the only way to experience one of the world’s most iconic natural wonder.

**Day 9:** Harrisburg

**Day 10:** Washington D.C.

**Day 11:** New Jersey
- Drive to New York City and visit the Shri Swaminarayan Mandir and have all-vegetarian cuisine to experience some traditional and authentic tastes of India.
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Manhattan, drive past Brooklyn and Manhattan Bridges, United Nations Headquarters, Trump Tower, Central Park and many more sights.

**Day 12:** New Jersey

**Day 13:** Orlando

**Day 14:** Orlando

**Day 15:** Orlando

**Day 16:** Orlando
- Proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end. Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

**Summary:** The 'South American Delights (Summer 2024)' package is an 11-day tour covering Rio de Janeiro, Iguassu, Lima, Cusco, and Buenos Aires. **Summary:** The 'South American Delights with Add On Ushuaia and Patagonia (Summer 2024)' package is a 16-day tour covering Rio de Janeiro, Iguassu, Lima, Cusco, Buenos Aires, Ushuaia, and El Calafate. The itinerary includes visits to the iconic statue of Christ the Redeemer, Sugarloaf Mountain, Copacabana beach, Iguassu Falls, Machu Picchu, and Perito Moreno Glacier, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city excursions, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Rio de Janeiro
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Rio: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Rio de Janeiro
- Visit statue of Christ the Redeemer, Sugarloaf Mountain, Copacabana beach.
- Today, we start our day by taking a cog-wheel train up to the Corcovado Mountain to visit the iconic statue of Christ the Redeemer. Later, proceed on a guided city tour of Rio, drive through downtown Rio, passing by the Maracana Stadium, the Sambodrome and Metropolitan Cathedral. Later in afternoon we visit the world famous Sugar Loaf Mountain which has become an iconic symbol of the city of Rio de Janeiro. Get a unique experience in the cable car while going up to the mountain. We also visit the famous Copacabana Beach and the downtown area. 

**Day 3:** Iguassu
- Fly to Iguassu. 
- Today, we drive to airport to board your flight to Iguassu. Iguassu is famous for its stunning falls, a total of 275 waterfalls make up the Iguassu Falls, which are the widest and most imposing waterfalls on earth. Later you have some free time to explore the city on your own.

**Day 4:** Iguassu
- Visit Iguassu Falls from Argentinean side.
- Today, we visit the Argentinean side of the Iguassu Falls. We start with a short train ride that leads us to the trails. Later a walk along the catwalks, some 1200 meters over the islands, takes you to enjoy the most spectacular sight: the Devil’s Throat Fall.

**Day 5:** Lima
- Visit Iguassu Falls from Brazilian Side.
- Today, we take a trip to the Brazilian side of the falls. We walk along a narrow 1,500m. path and along with the catwalk that goes very close to the bottom of the Devil’s Throat, from where you will enjoy breathtaking views over the Brazilian side of the falls. Later, we take a flight to Lima - the capital of Peru.

**Day 6:** Lima
- Guided tour of Lima
- Today, we take you on a guided tour of Lima. See, the Love Park in Miraflores, with a spectacular view of the Pacific Ocean and Huaca Pucllana- ceremonial center of the Lima culture. Visit the Main Square where the Government Palace and the Town Hall are located. Also visit the Cathedral and explore the Santo Domingo Convent. Later you have some free time to explore the city on your own.

**Day 7:** Cusco
- Fly to Cusco - Archaeological Capital of the Americas.
- Today, we take a flight to Cusco. On arrival, proceed on a guided city tour. Visit the famous Temple of Sun Korikancha - the most important temple in the Inca Empire. See the archaeological sites that date from Inca and the famous cathedral of Cusco. Later you have some free time at the Main Square.

**Day 8:** Cusco
- Visit one of the Seven Wonders of the World - Machu Picchu.
- Today, proceed to visit one of the wonders of the world - Machu Picchu. You will start by a train going through the Urubamba Valley, the Sacred Valley of the Incas, to the fabulous mountaintop ruins of Machu Picchu. This city is an eye-tantalizing tribute to man in harmony with nature. Enjoy the full day in this magical place and later take a train back to Cusco.

**Day 9:** Buenos Aires
- Fly to Buenos Aires. Enjoy an exciting Tango show with dinner.
- Today, proceed to airport for your flight to Buenos Aires the capital of Argentina. On arrival, proceed to your hotel and check-in. Later in the evening you will be taken for the glamorous Tango Show with dinner - a musical extravaganza with poetical, entertaining and touching edges.

**Day 10:** Buenos Aires
- Guided city tour of Buenos Aires.
- Today, proceed on a guided city tour of this beautiful city. See the symbol of this city: the obelisk on avenida 9 de Julio, visit Plaza de Mayo and Plaza San Martín. Drive through historical and elegant neighborhoods like La Boca, San Telmo, Montserrat, Palermo and Recoleta. Also see some important financial and commercial areas of the city. Later, evening is at leisure for shopping on your own.

**Day 11:** Ushuaia
- Fly to Ushuaia. Enjoy city tour of Ushuaia.
- Today, proceed to airport for your flight to Ushuaia - resort town in Argentina & southernmost city in the world. On arrival, proceed to your hotel and check-in. Later, proceed on a guided city tour of Ushuaia. Visit Historical Buildings with their particular style and landscapes. Next, visit to Museo del Fin del Mundo (End of the World Museum).

**Day 12:** Ushuaia
- Enjoy Beagle Channel cruise & chance to take a ride on “End of the World Train”.
- Today, proceed for Beagle Channel cruise. Admire views of the city of Ushuaia and islands in the channel that are home to colonies of sea lions and cormorants.  Later, you have a free time to enjoy this beautiful city on your own OR you can opt for a ride on “End of the World Train” from Ushuaia to the Tierra del Fuego National Park. Explore the remote wilderness of Patagonia’s southern tip. Enjoy spectacular views over the Beagle Channel as you take in highlights like Ensenada Bay, Laguna Verde, Beaver Dam and Lapataia Bay on this tour.

**Day 13:** El Calafate
- Fly to El Calafate. Enjoy guided tour of El Calafate.
- Today, proceed to airport for your flight to El Calafate. On arrival, proceed to your hotel and check-in. Later, proceed on a guided tour of old town, during which we drive past the early 20th-century buildings and homes built by the town’s first settlers, as well as the main plaza.

**Day 14:** El Calafate
- Excursion to famous Perito Moreno Glacier.
- Today, we set off to Perito Moreno, one of Patagonia's most imposing and most visited glaciers, located in the UNESCO-listed Los Glaciares National Park. Admire the gigantic ice formation from different perspectives during the brisk hike along the surrounding catwalks. Later we take a boat ride between floating ice and marvel at the mighty ice walls and absolute beauty and grandeur of the Perito Moreno Glacier. Rest of the day is free for leisure or shopping.

**Day 15:** Buenos Aires
- Fly to Buenos Aires
- Today, proceed to airport on your own for your flight to Buenos Aires. On arrival, proceed to your hotel and check-in. Rest of the day is free for leisure or Shopping.

**Day 16:** Buenos Aires
- Bid farewell.
- Today, proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end. Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

**Summary:** The 'Mauritius - Oceans Creek Resort - Honeymoon Special' package is a 7-day tour to Mauritius, offering a romantic getaway for couples. The itinerary includes visits to the North Island, South Island, and Ile Aux Cerfs, with activities such as guided tours, water sports, and shopping. Participants will enjoy a comfortable stay at the Oceans Creek Resort, with meals and transfers included. The package also includes travel insurance and English-speaking driver cum guide.

- Transfer to Hotel on Seat in Coach Basis.

- After Breakfast, proceed to Full Day North Island Tour on Seat in Coach Basis.
- Visit the Citadel Fort, Champ de Mars racecourse, Le Caudan Waterfront, Apravasi Ghat Museum, and Kuanfu Tea factory.

**Day 4:** South Island Tour

**Inclusions:**

**Summary:** The 'Irish Discovery - By Cosmos' package is a 9-day tour covering Dublin, Belfast, Sligo, Limerick, Killarney, and Tramore. The itinerary includes visits to the Guinness Storehouse, Titanic Belfast Experience, Giant's Causeway, Cliffs of Moher, and Blarney Castle, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local markets and pubs. The package includes full Irish breakfast daily, three three-course dinners with choice of menus, and accommodations at hand-selected hotels.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** ARRIVE IN DUBLIN, IRELAND
- Check into your hotel.
- Meet your Tour Director and travel companions for an afternoon orientation drive through statue-lined O’Connell Street and elegant Georgian squares to St. Patrick’s Cathedral and Trinity College.
- Optional dinner evening at the Guinness Storehouse.

**Day 2:** DUBLIN–DOWNPATRICK, NORTHERN IRELAND–BELFAST
- Drive to Belfast and visit the Titanic Belfast Experience.
- Enjoy a guided tour of Belfast.

**Day 3:** BELFAST–GIANT’S CAUSEWAY–DERRY–DONEGAL, IRELAND–SLIGO
- Visit the awe-inspiring Giant’s Causeway.
- Drive to Donegal and visit the ancient town founded by Danish Vikings.
- Arrive in Sligo.

**Day 4:** SLIGO–GALWAY–CLIFFS OF MOHER–LIMERICK
- Travel to Galway and visit the Cliffs of Moher.
- Cross the limestone plateau of The Burren.
- Arrive in Limerick.

**Day 5:** LIMERICK–ADARE–DINGLE PENINSULA–KILLARNEY
- Visit Adare, a village known for its prize-winning thatched cottages.
- Take in the breathtaking scenery of the Dingle Peninsula.
- Arrive in Killarney.

**Day 6:** KILLARNEY. RING OF KERRY EXCURSION
- Take a 100-mile coastal panoramic drive along the Ring of Kerry.
- Visit the Ladies View and Ross Castle.
- Enjoy a horse-drawn jaunting car along the national park lakeshore.

**Day 7:** KILLARNEY–BLARNEY–WATERFORD–TRAMORE
- Visit Blarney, famous for its Stone of Eloquence.
- Drive to Waterford and visit the House of Waterford Crystal.
- Arrive in Tramore.

**Day 8:** TRAMORE–KILKENNY–DUBLIN
- Visit Kilkenny to wander the Medieval Mile and learn about its Norman heritage.
- Enjoy an optional Irish cabaret evening, including dinner, dance, song, and laughter.

**Day 9:** DUBLIN
- Enjoy a full Irish breakfast.
- Depart for the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Europamundo - United Kingdom and Ireland' package is a 10-day tour covering London, Durham, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Dublin, and Liverpool. The itinerary includes visits to Westminster, the Houses of Parliament, the City and the River Thames, Cambridge, York, Alnwick, Edinburgh Castle, Pitlochry, Loch Ness, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat trips, and visits to historic sites, as well as free time to explore the cities and their surroundings. The package includes meals, transportation, and accommodations, as well as entrance fees to certain attractions.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of London: See Westminster, the Houses of Parliament, the City and the River Thames.

**Day 2:** London
- Guided tour of London: Visit the Thames River Valley, along with the town of Windsor and its imposing castle.
- Free time in the afternoon to explore the city.
- Optionally visit the Beatles Story Exhibition.

**Day 3:** Durham
- Drive to Durham and visit the city's cathedral and castle.
- Explore the charming medieval town of Durham.

**Day 4:** Edinburgh
- Drive to Edinburgh and visit the city's monumental center, including the castle and the equestrian statue of St. Stephen.
- Enjoy a sightseeing tour with a local guide.

**Day 5:** Glasgow
- Drive to Glasgow and visit the city's parks, old university, and lively downtown streets.
- Visit the Urquhart medieval castle and take a boat trip on Loch Ness.

**Day 6:** Dublin
- Drive to Dublin and visit the city's Trinity College and its lively downtown streets.
- Enjoy a sightseeing tour with a local guide.

**Day 7:** Liverpool
- Drive to Liverpool and visit the city's World Heritage Site and the second port of the United Kingdom.
- Visit the Beatles Story Exhibition.

**Day 8:** London
- Drive to London and visit the city's historic center, including the Houses of Parliament and the River Thames.
- Enjoy a sightseeing tour with a local guide.

**Day 9:** London
- Visit the city's historic center, including the Tower of London and the London Eye.
- Enjoy a sightseeing tour with a local guide.

**Day 10:** London
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Highlights Of Ireland and Scotland - By Cosmos' package is a 12-day tour covering Dublin, Tramore, Killarney, Limerick, Sligo, Belfast, Glasgow, and Edinburgh. The itinerary includes visits to the Cliffs of Moher, Giant's Causeway, Edinburgh Castle, and the Royal and Ancient Golf Club, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to historic sites and cultural events.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrive in Dublin, Ireland
- Check into your hotel.
- Meet your Tour Director and travel companions for an afternoon orientation drive through statue-lined O’Connell Street and elegant Georgian squares to St. Patrick’s Cathedral and Trinity College.

**Day 2:** Dublin
- Meet your Tour Director and traveling companions to start your day in the “Fair City” with an orientation drive along statue-lined O’Connell Street; elegant Georgian squares with their tall red brick townhouses, multi-hued doors and wrought-iron decorated windows; Oscar Wilde’s Trinity College; and St. Patrick’s Cathedral.

**Day 3:** Dublin–Kilkenny–Waterford–Tramore
- Drive to Kilkenny, with its medieval cobblestone streets and Old-World charm.
- Continue on to Waterford, famous for its exquisite crystal, before arriving at the seaside resort of Tramore.

**Day 4:** Tramore–Blarney–Ring of Kerry–Killarney
- The first of today’s highlights is Blarney, famous for its Stone of Eloquence, with time at leisure to see the castle and shop for Irish handicrafts and handmade crystal.
- At Kenmare, join part of the Ring of Kerry, and stop for spectacular photos of the Lakes of Killarney from Ladies View before arriving in the popular resort town of Killarney.

**Day 5:** Killarney–Adare–Limerick
- In Killarney this morning, there is time for an optional horse-drawn jaunting car ride along the National Park lakeshore for pictures of Ross Castle.
- Then to Adare, renowned as one of Ireland’s prettiest towns.
- On to Limerick and, this evening, consider joining an optional medieval-themed banquet.

**Day 6:** Limerick–Cliffs of Moher–Galway–Sligo
- Breathtaking scenery awaits you today.
- Start with a visit to the spectacular 668-foot Cliffs of Moher and fantastic views over the Atlantic and Clare coast.
- Then, cross the limestone plateau of The Burren and stop in Galway, a popular seaside destination and a buzzing cosmopolitan district with vibrant shops, and a busy café and bar culture.
- Your destination for tonight is Sligo.

**Day 7:** Sligo-Derry, Northern Ireland–Giant’s Causeway–Belfast
- Drive along Donegal Bay with its small fishing ports and hidden beaches to Derry, the walled city on the banks of the Foyle River.
- Continue on to awe-inspiring Giant’s Causeway, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
- Hear how millions of years ago, the more than 40,000 interlocking basalt columns were formed.
- Overnight in the vibrant city of Belfast, where the Titanic was built.

**Day 8:** Belfast–Alloway, Scotland–Glasgow
- Enjoy a leisurely morning in the capital city of Northern Ireland before boarding the ferry for the Irish Sea crossing to Cairnryan.
- On your way to Glasgow, stop in Alloway, the birthplace of Scottish poet Robert Burns.

**Day 9:** Glasgow–Fort William–Fort Augustus–Culloden Moor–Highlands
- Follow the “Bonnie Banks” of Loch Lomond, and proceed via wild Rannoch Moor, Glen Coe, Fort William, beneath Ben Nevis and Fort Augustus.
- In the afternoon, look out for signs of the mysterious Loch Ness monster, on the way to Culloden Moor where the Jacobite Rising, with Bonnie Prince Charlie at its helm, came to a tragic end at the hands of the Hanoverians.

**Day 10:** Highlands–Pitlochry–St. Andrews–Edinburgh
- Travel through the spectacular Cairngorms National Park to Pitlochry, the Victorian mountain resort set amongst a beautiful scenery.
- Then, head to St. Andrews, whose Royal and Ancient Golf Club has given us the rules of golfing.
- Finally, cross the elegant Forth Road Bridge to Edinburgh.
- A suggestion for this evening: a traditional Scottish night out with Highland dancers, bagpipers, and, of course, the Ceremony of the Haggis.

**Day 11:** Edinburgh
- A full day to enjoy the Scottish capital.
- Morning sightseeing with a Local Guide introduces you to the 200-year-old “New Town,” home to famous scientists, inventors, and novelists.
- In the “Old Town,” visit Edinburgh Castle to admire Scotland’s Crown Jewels.
- Afternoon at leisure.
- For departures July 26 & 27 and August 2, 9 & 10 tickets are included for tonight’s performance of the world-renowned Military Tattoo.

**Day 12:** Edinburgh
- Your vacation ends with breakfast this morning.

**Summary:** The 'Awesome Philippines - Honeymoon Special' package is a 9-day tour covering Manila, El Nido, and Boracay. The itinerary includes visits to Manila's financial district, Forbes Park, War Memorial, Global City, Mall of Asia, and Rizal Park, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, romantic dinners, and island hopping excursions. The package includes airport-hotel-airport transfers, daily breakfast, and a 1-hour couple massage.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Manila
- Arrive at Manila airport and transfer to hotel in Makati.
- Check-in at hotel and rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2:** Manila to El Nido
- Transfer from Manila to El Nido.
- Enjoy a 1-hour couple massage.
- Rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 3:** El Nido Tour A
- Visit Big Lagoon, Secret Lagoon, Payong paying Beach, Shimizu Island, and Seven Commando Beach.
- Enjoy a local lunch.

**Day 4:** El Nido
- Enjoy a romantic dinner by the beach.
- Rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 5:** El Nido to Boracay
- Transfer from El Nido to Boracay.
- Enjoy a romantic paraw sailing for 1 hour.

**Day 6:** Boracay Island Hopping
- Visit the islands surrounding Boracay.
- Enjoy a local lunch.

**Day 7:** Boracay
- Day free to explore on your own.

**Day 8:** Boracay to Manila
- Transfer from Boracay to Manila.
- Enjoy a half-day Manila city tour.

**Day 9:** Departure
- Transfer to airport for flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Spain, Portugal & Morocco - By Cosmos' package is a 16-day tour covering Madrid, Lisbon, Seville, Rabat, Marrakesh, Fez, Mijas, and Granada. The itinerary includes visits to the Mezquita, the Alhambra Complex, the Bahia Palace, and Majorelle Gardens, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing excursions, and visits to local markets and souks. The package includes buffet breakfasts daily and 8 dinners, as well as seamless transportation between destinations with a private, first-class, air-conditioned motorcoach with free Wi-Fi.

**Summary:** The 'North East Delight With Pelling' package is a 7-day tour covering Gangtok, Pelling, and Darjeeling. The itinerary includes visits to Tsomgo Lake, Baba Mandir, Pemayangtse Monastery, Rabdentse Ruins, Sky Walk, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local markets and tea estates.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Gangtok
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Gangtok: See the Do Drul Chorten, Institute of Tibetology, and Flower Show.

**Day 2:** Gangtok
- Excursion trip to Tsomgo Lake and Baba Mandir.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the lake and the mandir.
- Enroute light lunch will be served in a local restaurant.

**Day 3:** Pelling
- Drive to Pelling and visit the Sky Walk, Pemayangtse Monastery, and Rabdentse Ruins.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the attractions.
- Post lunch drive to Darjeeling.

**Day 4:** Pelling
- Visit the Yuksom excursion: See the Darap Village, Rimbi Water fall, and Khecheopalri Lake.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the attractions.
- Enroute veg lunch will be served at a local restaurant.

**Day 5:** Darjeeling
- Drive to Darjeeling and visit the Tiger Hill to watch the spectacular view of Mt. Kanchendzonga.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the attractions.
- Enroute veg lunch will be served at a local restaurant.

**Day 6:** Darjeeling
- Visit the Ghoom Monastery, Batasia Loop War Memorial, and Padmaja N. Zoological Garden.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the attractions.
- Enroute veg lunch will be served at a local restaurant.

**Day 7:** Darjeeling
- Morning transfer to Bagdogra Airport.
- Devour your breakfast and then check-out from the hotel.
- You’ll be transferred to the Bagdogra Airport as it’s time to say goodbye with memories to cherish for long.

**Summary:** The 'The Best Of Italy - By Globus' package is an 11-day tour covering Rome, Florence, Venice, Assisi, and Capri. The itinerary includes visits to the Vatican Museums, Sistine Chapel, St. Peter’s Square and Basilica, Colosseum, Roman Forum, Michelangelo’s David, Giotto’s Bell Tower, and Signoria Square, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, private boat rides on the canals, glassblowing demonstrations, and scenic cruises around the island of Capri. The package includes full buffet breakfast daily, 5 three-course dinners, and transportation between destinations.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** ARRIVE IN ROME, ITALY
- Welcome to Rome! Meet your Tour Director and travel companions for a welcome dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 2:** ROME
- Guided sightseeing includes the Vatican Museums, Sistine Chapel, and St. Peter’s Square and Basilica to admire Michelangelo’s Pieta. Visit the Colosseum and see the Roman Forum.

**Day 3:** ROME–ORVIETO–MONTECATINI
- Miracles and Men of the Cloth: Visit Orvieto and enjoy a guided tour of the cathedral. Enjoy free time for lunch before departing for Montecatini.

**Day 4:** MONTECATINI. EXCURSION TO FLORENCE
- Italian Beauties: Guided sightseeing includes Michelangelo’s masterpiece, David, at the Academy of Fine Arts, Giotto’s Bell Tower, the Baptistry’s heavy bronze “Gates of Paradise,” and Signoria Square.

**Day 5:** MONTECATINI–PISA–VENICE ISLAND
- The Tilted Tower: See the Leaning Tower en route to Venice. Free time for dinner.

**Day 6:** VENICE ISLAND
- Benvenuti a Venezia: Take a private boat ride on the canals. Guided walking tour includes St. Mark’s Square and Basilica, Doge’s Palace and the Bridge of Sighs followed by a glassblowing demonstration.

**Day 7:** VENICE ISLAND–ASSISI
- Medieval Marvels: Scenic drive through the Apennine Mountains en route to Assisi. Guided walking tour includes St. Clare’s Church and St. Francis’ Basilica.

**Day 8:** ASSISI–POMPEII–NAPLES–CAPRI
- Time Standing Still in Pompeii: Join a guided walking tour of the excavations followed by free time for lunch. NAPLES Embark on a jetfoil ride to the island of Capri. CAPRI Take a funicular ride from the harbor to Capri village.

**Day 9:** CAPRI
- Coves & Cliffs on the Clear Blue Sea: Guided sightseeing includes an open-taxi ride to Anacapri to visit famous Villa San Michele. Take a scenic cruise (weather permitting) around the island.

**Day 10:** CAPRI–SORRENTO–ROME
- Arrivederci, Roma: Embark on a jetfoil ride to Sorrento. SORRENTO Enjoy free time for lunch. ROME Join a farewell dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 11:** ROME
- Safe travels until we meet again! Your vacation ends with breakfast this morning.

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon - Kashmir Magic Moments with Gulmarg Excursion' package is a 6-day romantic getaway to the beautiful state of Jammu and Kashmir. The itinerary includes visits to Srinagar, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg, with a focus on experiencing the natural beauty and cultural heritage of the region. Participants will enjoy shikara rides, romantic candlelight dinners, and photography sessions, among other activities. The package includes daily breakfast, 4 complimentary dinners, and a range of experiences and activities, making it an ideal choice for couples celebrating their honeymoon.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Srinagar
- Arrive at Srinagar Airport and transfer to houseboat
- Enjoy a shikara ride in Dal Lake and relax for the day
- Overnight stay at the houseboat

- Overnight stay at the hotel in Srinagar

**Day 6:** Departure from Srinagar
- Transfer to Srinagar airport for return flight with happy memories!

**Summary:** The 'Luxury Train Golden Chariot - Pride of Karnataka' package is a 6-day luxury train journey covering the states of Karnataka and Goa. The itinerary includes visits to Nanjangud, Mysore, Chikmagalur, Hospet, and Goa, with stops at Bandipur Wildlife Sanctuary, Mysore Palace, and Hampi ruins. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cultural activities, and scenic views of the Indian countryside. The train journey will take you through the picturesque landscapes of Karnataka and Goa, with comfortable accommodations and delicious meals onboard.

**Summary:** The 'Ramayan Anant Yatra - Baal - Ayodhya Kand' package is a 5-day tour covering Ayodhya and Prayagraj. The itinerary includes visits to temples, hermitages, and other attractions related to the Ramayan epic. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and cultural experiences.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Ayodhya
- Morning arrival at Lucknow, transfer to Ayodhaya.
- Visit Temples of Ayodhaya.
- Overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 2:** Ayodhya
- Visit Hanuman Garhi, Sita Mahal, Raj Darbar, Valmiki Temple.
- Overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 3:** Prayagraj
- Drive to Prayagraj (175 Km, 4-5 Hrs).
- Visit Bhardwaj Ashram, Mankameshwar Temple, Shringverpur.
- Overnight stay at the hotel.

**Day 4:** Prayagraj
- Full day excursion of Chitrakoot.

**Summary:** The 'The Grand Tour of Switzerland - Cosmos' package is a 10-day tour covering Zurich, St. Moritz, Lugano, Zermatt, Lausanne, and Lucerne. The itinerary includes visits to the Bernina Express train, Lake Maggiore, the Matterhorn, and the Old Town of Lucerne, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic drives, and visits to local cheese factories and vineyards.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Zurich
- Check into your hotel in Zurich and start exploring with the assistance of your CosmosGO app.
- Tonight, meet your Tour Director and travel companions.

**Day 2:** Zurich to St. Moritz
- Drive to Appenzell to see the Old Town with its 16th-century Town Hall.
- Continue to the minute Principality of Liechtenstein for a visit of its tiny capital, Vaduz.
- Pass through scenic “Heidiland” and into the Rhine Valley before ascending mighty Julier Pass.
- Spend the next two nights in glamorous St. Moritz.

**Day 3:** At leisure in St. Moritz
- Enjoy a day to explore this scenic Engadin valley resort.
- Renowned for its stunning forest, lake, and mountain setting and an average of 322 days of sunshine per year, St. Moritz is comprised of two villages separated by a mile of lake shore - St. Moritz Dorf and St. Moritz Bad.

**Day 4:** St. Moritz to Lugano
- Experience one of Europe’s most spectacular train rides, the Bernina Express.
- Board the train in St. Moritz, and travel across the lofty Bernina Pass via the Swiss Poschiavo area to Tirano in the Italian Valtellina.
- Here, rejoin your coach and journey to the shores of sparkling Lake Lugano.

**Day 5:** Lugano to Zermatt
- Discover the highlights of charming, subtropical Lugano before traveling to Lake Maggiore, Italy’s second-largest lake.
- Consider joining the optional boat trip to visit to the garden island of Isola Bella with its splendid 17th-century palazzo (palace).
- Return to Switzerland via picturesque Simplon Pass to your overnight destination, a resort surrounded by Switzerland’s highest mountains—including the celebrated Matterhorn.

**Day 6:** Zermatt to Lausanne
- Time to stroll through car-free Zermatt, connected to Tasch with an alpine train.
- Maybe take a break to sample the local fare, like raclette (melted Swiss cheese), fondue, or hand-made chocolate.
- Perhaps shop for an authentic Swiss watch or Swiss Army knife.
- Then, rejoin the coach in Täsch and continue your journey through the vineyards and apricot groves of the lower Rhone Valley to crescent-shaped Lake Geneva, one of Europe’s largest lakes.

**Day 7:** Lausanne
- Spend either a day at leisure exploring Lausanne and its environs, or join an optional excursion to charming Geneva with its cobblestoned Old Town and the Palais des Nations, European headquarters of the United Nations.

**Day 8:** Lausanne to Lucerne
- The first stop today is in picturesque Gruyeres to visit a local cheese factory.
- Then, on to Berne, Switzerland’s charming 12th-century capital.
- The Old Town is a showcase of medieval architecture, arcaded shops, artistic fountains, and the landmark Zytglogge (clock tower), an ornate animated astronomical clock built in 1530.
- Travel on, skirting the shores of Lake Thun, and stop in the renowned resort of Interlaken for a visit before crossing Brunig Pass to Lucerne.

**Day 9:** Lucerne to Zurich
- Discover the wonders of Lucerne, a city straight out of a storybook.
- Situated on Lake Lucerne beneath the snow-capped Alps, Lucerne highlights include cobblestone streets lined with frescoed homes, the world-famous Chapel bridge, and the poignant Lion monument.
- Perhaps choose from a wonderful selection of optional activities—the most popular is an excursion to mount Stanserhorn.
- Return to Zurich for an overnight.

**Day 10:** Departure from Zurich
- Your vacation ends with breakfast this morning.

**Summary:** The '9 Devi Anant Yatra' package is a 7-day tour covering various religious destinations in India. The itinerary includes visits to Mansa Devi Temple, Kalka Mata Temple, Naina Devi Temple, Jwala Ji Temple, Chintapurni Devi Temple, Kangda Ji Temple, Chamunda Devi Temple, and Baglamukhi Devi Temple, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Darshan, and visits to various temples and shrines. The tour also includes a visit to the holy shrine of Vaishno Devi in Katra.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Chandigarh
- Arrive in Chandigarh
- Welcome onboard a wonderful Yatra to one of the most religious destinations!
- Transfer from Airport to Hotel and check-in at the Hotel
- Visit Mansa Devi Temple and Kalka Mata Temple
- Overnight stay at the Hotel in Chandigarh

**Day 2:** Dharamsala
- Chandigarh - Naina Devi Temple - Dharamshala
- After Buffet Breakfast, proceed for Dharamshala – On route Darshan Naina Devi Temple
- After Visit Drive To Dharamshala, Arrive Dharamshala check-in at the Hotel
- Dinner & Overnight stay at hotel in Dharamshala

**Day 3:** Dharamsala
- Dharamshala – Jwala Ji Temple – Chintapurni Devi Temple - Dharamshala
- After Buffet Breakfast, proceed for Darshan
- Visit Jwala Ji Temple and Chintapurni Devi Temple
- After Visit Drive To Dharamshala, Arrive Dharamshala check-in at the Hotel
- Dinner & Overnight stay at hotel in Dharamshala

**Day 4:** Dharamsala
- Dharamshala – Kangda Ji - Chamunda Devi - Baglamukhi Devi - Dharamshala
- After Buffet Breakfast, proceed for Darshan
- Visit Kangda Ji Temple, Chamunda Devi Temple, and Baglamukhi Devi Temple
- After Visit Drive back to Dharamshala
- Dinner & Overnight stay at hotel in Dharamshala

**Day 5:** Katra
- Dharamshala – Katra
- After Buffet Breakfast, proceed for Katra
- Katra is a small town in Reasi district in the union territory of Jammu and Kashmir, situated in the foothills of the Trikuta mountains, where the holy shrine of Vaishno Devi is located
- In the evening arrive and Check into the hotel
- Overnight stay will in Katra

**Day 6:** Katra
- Katra (Darshan Mata Vaishnodevi Temple)
- After Breakfast, proceed for Mata Vaishno Devi Bhawan - one of the most popular pilgrimage of India situated, at an altitude of around 5200 feet
- Yatra involves a trek of nearly 14 Kms from base camp at Katra known as Ban Ganga
- Alternate way to perform darshans is by Helicopter (Need to be booked by guest on shrine board website) or battery operated cars which one can get from midway ( need to be booked well in advance on shrine board website), Ponies/Palkis
- Guest can also visit Ardhkuwari & Bhairo Mandir (One can go Bhairo Mandir by ropeway from Vaishno Devi Bhavan, tickets for which can be booked on real time basis)
- After visiting the temples, return back to the hotel in Katra and relax for an overnight stay

**Day 7:** Katra
- Fly Back Home From ( Katra / Jammu / Amritsar )
- Departure from Katra / Jammu / Amritsar:
- Today after breakfast, transfer to Katra Railway Station / Jammu Airport / Amritsar Airport to board the return flight as per guest preference

**Summary:** The 'Experience Kashmir with Sonmarg Excursion' package is a 7-day tour covering Srinagar, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg. - Transfer to Houseboat and check-in
- Enjoy shikara ride in Dal lake
- Overnight Stay at the Houseboat

**Day 2:** Pahalgam
- Drive to Pahalgam (94 Kms / approx 03 hrs)
- Visit Shankaracharya Temple
- Visit Nishat Bagh -'The garden of pleasure'
- Visit Shalimar Bagh -'Abode of Love'
- Overnight Stay at the Hotel

**Day 3:** Pahalgam
- Proceed for Pahalgam City Tour
- Enjoy ABC valley (Aru valley, Betaab valley, chandanwari valley - on direct payment basis & subject to Operation)

- Visit Avantipur ruins and Kashmiri Cricket Bat Factory
- Overnight Stay at the Hotel

**Day 5:** Srinagar

- Departure from Srinagar
