**Summary:** The 'Avismarniya Europe - (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering London, Paris, Brussels, Amsterdam, Cologne, Zurich, Innsbruck, and Rome. The itinerary includes visits to Tower of London, Madame Tussauds, London Eye, Eiffel Tower, Seine River Cruise, Versailles Palace, Mini Europe, Keukenhof, Cheese Farm, Wooden Shoe Workshop, Rhine River Cruise, Black Forest, Rhine Falls, Jungfraujoch, Mt. Titlis, Lake Lucerne Cruise, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to famous landmarks and museums.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Dinner at the hotel.

**Day 2:** London
- Guided City Tour of London: See Buckingham Palace, Changing of King’s Guard, Hyde Park, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge, and Thames River.
- Visit Madame Tussauds wax museum.
- Ride on the London Eye.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Take the high-speed train – Eurostar and cross the English Channel to arrive in Paris.
- Proceed for a Guided City Tour of Paris: See Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Invalides, and Champs Elysees.
- Enjoy a cruise on the Seine River.

**Day 4:** Paris
- Proceed for a Guided Tour of Versailles Palace with private apartments, Opera Hall, the Chapel & Hall of Mirrors.
- Visit the Eiffel Tower 2nd level.

**Day 5:** Brussels
- Visit Mini Europe – Europe in Miniature.
- Proceed on an Orientation Tour of Brussels: Enjoy free time at Grand Place and see the famous Manneken Pis statue.

**Day 6:** Amsterdam
- Visit Keukenhof – the largest Spring Garden in the World.
- Visit a Cheese Farm & Wooden Shoe Factory.
- Enjoy a cruise on the canals of Amsterdam in a glass–topped boat.

**Day 7:** Cologne
- Visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on the River Rhine.

**Day 8:** Zurich
- Visit the Black Forest region, known for its dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- See the Rhine Falls.

**Day 9:** Zurich
- Proceed for an excursion to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.
- Visit Interlaken.

**Day 10:** Zurich
- Visit Mt Titlis.
- Our cable car ride includes the world’s first rotating cable car, the Rotair – to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters.
- Do visit the “Cliff Walk” a suspension bridge along the cliff of Mt. Titlis.
- Proceed for an orientation tour of Lucerne: See the Lion Monument, and Kapellbrucke with some free time to shop for famous Swiss watches, knives and chocolates.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on Lake Lucerne.

**Day 11:** Innsbruck
- Visit Mini Train ride in Vaduz - the capital of Liechtenstein – the 6th smallest country in the world.
- Visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop.
- Proceed to Innsbruck.
- Enjoy an Orientation Tour: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse.

**Day 12:** Venice
- Visit St. Mark’s square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile and Bridge of Sighs.

**Day 13:** Florence
- Proceed for a guided walking tour: see the Duomo, the Campanile, the Baptistery with its Gates of Paradise and Piazza Della Signoria.
- Proceed to Arezzo.

**Day 14:** Rome
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Vatican & Rome: Enter the Vatican City – the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed) including a visit to the St. Peter’s Basilica and St. Peter’s Square.
- Next, we continue with the guided city tour of Rome: See Circus Maximus and photo-stop at Colosseum & Arch of Constantine.
- Proceed to Arezzo.

**Day 15:** Pisa
- See the world-famous leaning tower of Pisa.
- Fly back home with pleasant memories.

**Summary:** The 'Albelu Europe With Istanbul - Gujrathi Special - Summer 2024' package is a 20-day tour covering Paris, Netherlands, Germany, Austria, Italy, Switzerland, and Turkey. The itinerary includes visits to Eiffel Tower, Disneyland Paris, Brussels, Keukenhof, Cologne Cathedral, Black Forest, Innsbruck, Venice, St. Mark's Square, Dolmabahce Palace, and Bosphorus Cruise, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to cheese farms, wooden shoe workshops, and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Paris
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Paris: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Paris
- Visit Eiffel Tower (2nd Level).
- Proceed on a guided city tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, and Les Invalides.
- Enjoy a romantic cruise on the River Seine.
- Illumination tour of Paris: See Paris by night, with some of the city’s famous monuments / sights lit up.

**Day 3:** Disneyland Paris
- Proceed to Disneyland Paris where you can visit Disneyland Park OR Walt Disney Studios Park.
- Get charmed by Sleeping Beauty Castle, enjoy exciting rollercoaster rides, meet Alice in Wonderland, Pinocchio, and others in Fantasyland as well as traveling to the four corners of the globe in Adventureland.

**Day 4:** Brussels
- Proceed to Brussels on arrival.
- Proceed for an orientation tour of Brussels: See the Grand Place, Manneken Pis statue with free time.
- Take a photo-stop at the Atomium.

**Day 5:** Netherlands
- Proceed to Netherlands.
- Visit Keukenhof – the largest spring garden in the world.
- Visit a cheese farm and wooden shoe factory.
- Enjoy a cruise on the canals of Amsterdam in a glass–topped boat.

**Day 6:** Germany
- Drive to Cologne and visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on the River Rhine.

**Day 7:** Seefeld
- Drive in the heart of the Black forest region, known for its dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- Later drive to Innsbruck.

**Day 8:** Padova
- Proceed to Wattens and visit the famous Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop.
- Visit the town of Tihany located on the shores of Lake Balaton.

**Day 9:** Arezzo
- Drive to the pier to take a private boat to Venice.
- Visit St. Mark’s square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile, and Bridge of Sighs.
- Later drive to Florence and visit Piazzale Michelangelo for a bird’s eye view of Florence.

**Day 10:** Arezzo
- Proceed to Rome for a guided tour of Rome and the Vatican City.
- Visit the holy Basilica of St. Peter’s and the St. Peter’s Square.
- Continue with the guided city tour of Rome; See Roman Forum, Circus Maximus, and photo stop at Colosseum & Piazza Venezia.

**Day 11:** Mendrissio
- Drive to Pisa and visit the Square of Miracles to see the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa.
- Next, drive to Como for a photo stop at Lake Como.
- Later, drive to Switzerland.

**Day 12:** Lausanne
- Visit Zermatt – a mountain village at the foot of the Matterhorn.
- Visit the Matterhorn Glacier Paradise.
- Take a cable car to Europe’s highest mountain station at an altitude of 3883m for breath-taking views of the French, Italian, and Swiss Alps.

**Day 13:** Engelberg
- Board the scenic Golden Pass train and enjoy panoramic views as we journey through alpine forest and picturesque villages.
- Visit Gstaad – a shooting location for Indian films for a Bollywood Trails tour, covering some of the favourite Indian film locations in the Gstaad valley.
- Later, drive to Broc and visit the Maison Cailler Chocolate Factory.

**Day 14:** Engelberg
- Visit Jungfraujoch – The Top of Europe.
- Take the cable car followed by a cogwheel train up to a height of 3,454 meters to Europe’s highest railway station.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.

**Day 15:** Zurich
- Visit Mt. Titlis.
- Our cable car ride includes the world’s first rotating cable car, the Rotair – to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters.
- Do visit the “Cliff Walk” a suspension bridge along the cliff of Mt. Titlis.

**Day 16:** Istanbul
- Proceed to the airport for your flight to Istanbul.
- On arrival, our Tour Manager / Local Representative will meet and welcome you outside the airport.
- Later, we proceed to the hotel and check–in.

**Day 17:** Istanbul
- Proceed on a full-day city tour of Sultanahmet.
- Take a photo-stop at Topkapi Palace & Hippodrome Square.
- Later, we visit the Golden Horn viewpoint.
- Next, we visit Blue Mosque and Hagia Sophia followed by some free time at Grand Bazaar.

**Day 18:** Istanbul
- Visit the Dolmabahce Palace – built in 19th century and one of the most glamorous palaces in the world.
- Next, we visit the famous Spice Market.
- Later, we enjoy a cruise on the Bosphorus Strait.

**Day 19:** Istanbul
- The entire day is free to explore Istanbul on your own or for shopping.

**Day 20:** Istanbul
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Grand Bargain Thailand (Summer 2024)' package is a 6-day tour covering Pattaya and Bangkok. **Summary:** The 'Fusion Europe - South Special (Summer 2024)' package is an 11-day tour covering Paris, Switzerland, Italy, and Germany. **Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Paris
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.

**Day 11:** Munich
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Best of Canadian Rockies With Alaskan Cruise (Summer 2024)' package is a 16-day tour covering Calgary, Banff, Jasper, Whistler, and Vancouver, with an Alaskan cruise. The itinerary includes visits to Sulphur Mountain, Lake Louise, Icefields Parkway, Maligne Canyon, and the Tracy Arm Fjords, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Calgary
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.

**Day 2:** Banff
- Drive to Banff National Park - Canada’s oldest national park, nestled amid the Canadian Rocky Mountains.
- Visit Sulphur Mountain by Gondola Ride.

**Day 3:** Banff
- Explore Banff National Park: Visit Lake Louise, world famous for its turquoise water, the Victoria Glacier and soaring mountain backdrop.
- Marvel at Moraine Lake's opalescent waters; learn about the human history of the landscapes; look for moose, bear, and elk.

**Day 4:** Jasper
- Drive to Jasper National Park by travelling along the trails of the early explorers and viewing the park’s unspoiled grandeur.
- Visit Maligne Canyon, created by over 10,000 years of water erosion.

**Day 5:** Whistler
- Drive to Whistler, one of the largest ski resorts in North America and 2010 Vancouver winter Olympics venue.
- Take a ride on the breathtaking ‘Peak 2 Peak’ Gondola, a scenic cableway.

**Day 6:** Vancouver
- Drive to Vancouver, en route stop by to view the Shannon falls.
- Visit the Capilano Suspension Bridge & Park. Guided City Tour. FlyOver Canada Ride.

**Day 7:** Vancouver
- Orientation tour of Victoria: See the Royal British Columbia Museum, Victoria’s Inner Harbor and the Parliament Building.
- Visit the beautiful Butchart Gardens, the 55 acres of beautiful garden haven, overflowing with lush greens and colourful blooms.

**Day 8:** Alaskan Cruise
- Board the cruise to Alaska. Enjoy your stay in Inside cabins.

**Day 9:** Alaskan Cruise
- Scenic Cruising the Inside Passage
- Keep your cameras and camcorders ready with you to capture some of the rarest moments to see and believe.

**Day 10:** Alaskan Cruise
- Tracy Arm Fjords and Glacier
- The ship sails through the most popular spot of Alaska that is the Tracy Arm Fjords.

**Day 11:** Alaskan Cruise
- Hubbard Glacier (Cruising)
- Overnight on board the cruise.

**Day 12:** Alaskan Cruise
- Sitka, Alaska
- After breakfast the guests and get off the ship and take one of our recommended shore excursions or just walk around the pier.

**Day 13:** Alaskan Cruise
- Juneau, Alaska
- After breakfast our guest can get off the ship for enjoying one of the shore excursions they booked from the cruise liner.

**Day 14:** Alaskan Cruise
- Ketchikan, Alaska
- We have half day at Ketchikan and our guests can choose to walk around the port or take one of our recommended shore excursions.

**Day 15:** Alaskan Cruise
- Cruising
- This day the guests have all by themselves where they can sit at the deck or at any part of the open area of the ship and enjoy the falling glaciers.

**Day 16:** Vancouver
- Bid farewell to all the friends you made and return home with great memories from this magnificent part of the world.

**Summary:** The 'Manmohak Europe (Summer 2024)' package is a 10-day tour covering London, Paris, Brussels, Cologne, Heidelberg, and Switzerland. The itinerary includes visits to Buckingham Palace, Eiffel Tower, Louvre Museum, Mini Europe, Cologne Cathedral, and Rhine River cruise, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city excursions, and visits to famous landmarks and museums.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside London Airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided tour of London: See Buckingham Palace, Hyde Park, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge, and Thames River.

**Day 2:** London
- Proceed on a guided City Tour of London: Ride on the London Eye and visit Madame Tussauds Wax Museum.
- Enjoy a visit to the famous Madame Tussauds Wax Museum.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Drive to Calais by the Le Shuttle / Ferry and onwards drive to Paris.
- Guided tour of Paris: Visit Louvre Museum with a local guide and see Leonardo Da Vinci’s world famous masterpiece – Mona Lisa.

**Day 4:** Paris
- Visit the Eiffel Tower (2nd level) and enjoy a guided tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Les Invalides, and Champs Elysees.

**Day 5:** Belgium
- Drive to Brussels and visit Mini Europe – Europe in Miniature.
- Orientation tour of Brussels: See the Grand Place with free time and photo stop at the Manneken Pis statue.

**Day 6:** Germany
- Drive to Cologne and visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a scenic Cruise on the River Rhine.

**Day 7:** Switzerland
- Orientation tour of Heidelberg: See the heart of Black Forest, famous for its beautifully dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- Visit the Rhine Falls.

**Day 8:** Switzerland
- Day at leisure OR Excursion to Jungfraujoch with lunch and Interlaken (Optional).
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.

**Day 9:** Switzerland
- Visit Mt. Titlis where you will take cable car rides including the world’s first rotating cable car, the Rotair – to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters.
- Orientation tour of Lucerne: See the Lion Monument and Kapellbrucke.

**Day 10:** Switzerland
- Fly back home with Pleasant Memories!

**Inclusions:**

- Return economy class group airfare as per the itinerary.
- All local taxes and services as of 1st November 2023.
- Cost of Visa and Medical Insurance for the duration of the tour.
- Sightseeing and accommodation as per the above-mentioned itinerary.
- All transfers and extensive excursions with entrance fees (as specified in the itinerary) by a deluxe air-conditioned coach.
- Services of a professional, friendly, and multilingual Tour Manager or a local Representative. (Subject to minimum 15 customers).

**Exclusions:**

- Any increase in the airfare charged by the airline on your air ticket (presently calculated as on 1st November 2023)

- The tour cost does not include POE charges and passport charges.
- No porterage included.
- Any expenses of a personal nature such as porterage, laundry expenses, wines, mineral water, food and drink not in the regular menu provided by us, minibar, telephone calls, etc.

**Summary:** The 'Jammu To Kashmir Darshan Yatra' package is a 10-day tour covering Jammu, Katra, Patnitop, Pahalgam, Gulmarg, and Srinagar. The itinerary includes visits to Raghunath Temple, Ranbireshwar Temple, Bahu Fort And Temple, Mata Vaishno Devi Bhawan, Sudh Mahadev Temple And Naag Devta Temple, Mamal Temple or Mamaleshwar Temple, Shri Gaurishanker Temple, Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, Chandanwari, Shankaracharya Temple, and Sonmarg. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Shikara ride on Dal Lake, Gondola ride at Gulmarg, and other activities.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Jammu
- Arrive at the Jammu Airport / Railway Station.
- Meet the local Airport Representative / Our Driver and proceed towards your pre-booked hotel.
- Visit Raghunath Temple, Ranbireshwar Temple, and Bahu Fort And Temple.

**Day 2:** Jammu - Katra
- After breakfast, proceed for Katra.
- Visit Mata Vaishno Devi Bhawan - one of the most popular pilgrimage of India situated, at an altitude of around 5200 feet.
- Enjoy a trek of nearly 14 Kms from base camp at Katra known as Ban Ganga.

**Day 3:** Katra
- After breakfast, proceed for Patnitop.
- Visit Sudh Mahadev Temple And Naag Devta Temple.
- Return back to the hotel in Katra and relax for an overnight stay.

**Day 4:** Katra - Patnitop
- After breakfast, proceed for Patnitop.
- Visit Mamal Temple or Mamaleshwar Temple, Shri Gaurishanker Temple.
- Return back to the hotel and relax for an overnight stay.

**Day 5:** Patnitop - Pahalgam
- After breakfast, proceed for Pahalgam.
- Visit Aru Valley - offering some fantastic scenes of the lush meadows and mountains.
- Visit Betaab Valley - initially known as the Harjan Valley, this valley was renamed after the hit Bollywood movie Betaab.
- Visit Chandanwari - starting point for Amarnath Yatra and is a popular hiking destination.

**Day 6:** Pahalgam
- After breakfast, visit Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, and Chandanwari.
- Enjoy riding on a pony up to Thajiwas Glacier (on direct payment basis & subject to Operation) or Sledge Riding on snow (on direct payment).
- Return back to the hotel in Pahalgam and relax for an overnight stay.

**Day 7:** Pahalgam - Gulmarg
- After breakfast, enjoy a picturesque drive to Gulmarg - "Meadow of Flowers".
- En-route, Visit Sun Temple in Martand.
- Visit Avantipur ruins -A excavated Temple complex dedicated to Lord Shiva and Vishnu were built by King Avantiraman in 9th century.
- Arrive and check-in at hotel. Evening is free to stroll on own.

**Day 8:** Gulmarg - Srinagar
- After breakfast, enjoy Asia's Highest Cable Car Project Gulmarg Gondola - The Gondola offers all tourists, scenic views of Pir Panjal Mountains and Valley as you head towards Phase 1: KHILANMARG.
- Enjoy a Sledge ride or Snow Mobile ride on the snow-covered slopes (on direct payment basis).
- Later proceed to Srinagar. Arrive at Srinagar Visit Shankaracharya Temple Than Check- in into the Hotel.

**Day 9:** Srinagar
- After breakfast, proceed for day excursion to Sonmarg - En-route - Visit Kheer Bhawani Temple.
- Arrive Sonmarg. Sonmarg lies in Sind Valley streamed with flowers and surrounded by mountains.
- Enjoy riding on a pony up to Thajiwas Glacier (on direct payment basis & subject to Operation) or Sledge Riding on snow (on direct payment).
- Return back to Srinagar by evening.

**Day 10:** Srinagar
- After breakfast, Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback And Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated.
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Kashmir tour.

**Summary:** The 'Asadharon Great Britain - Summer 2024' package is a 9-day tour covering London, Birmingham, Manchester, Glasgow, and Aberdeen. The itinerary includes visits to the Tower of London, Windsor Castle, Oxford, Cadbury World, Old Trafford Stadium, Loch Ness, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, steam train rides, and cruises on Lake Windermere. The tour also includes visits to Scotch Whiskey Distilleries and shopping time in various cities.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside the airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Packed dinner will be provided in case of late arrivals of flight or long queue at the immigration.

**Day 2:** London
- Guided tour of London: See the Buckingham Palace, Hyde Park, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge, and Thames River.
- Visit the Tower of London to see the crown jewels of the British Royal family.
- Enjoy a ride on the London Eye.

**Day 3:** Birmingham
- Drive to Windsor for a visit of the famous Windsor Castle – Queen Elizabeth II’s favorite weekend home.
- Proceed to Oxford and enjoy a guided walking tour of Oxford, famous for its ancient university, beautiful buildings, and iconic “Dreaming Spires”.
- Overnight in Birmingham.

**Day 4:** Manchester
- Visit Cadbury World to discover the history of Cadbury.
- Try your hand in making chocolate and meet Cadbury characters.
- Visit the famous Old Trafford Stadium - home to Manchester United Football Club.
- Overnight in Manchester.

**Day 5:** Glasgow
- Enjoy a Steam Train ride in Lake District and a cruise on Lake Windermere.
- Drive to Glasgow and enjoy some shopping time in the city.
- Overnight in Strathclyde / Glasgow.

**Day 6:** Glasgow
- Visit the Riverside Museum – a multi-award-winning museum located on the banks of the River Clyde.
- Proceed to Edinburgh and visit the Scottish Whiskey Experience in Scotland’s capital city.
- Enjoy a Guided city tour of Edinburgh, visit the Edinburgh castle, and see the Scottish Parliament and many more interesting sights.
- Overnight in Strathclyde / Glasgow.

**Day 7:** Aberdeen
- Check out and proceed to Falkirk for a photo stop at The Kelpies – a 30-meter high horse head sculpture.
- Visit a Scotch Whiskey Distillery to experience the process of making Scotch Whiskey.
- Arrive in Aberdeen, known for its beach front, where we spend some time at the esplanade.
- Overnight in Aberdeen.

**Day 8:** Glasgow
- Proceed for a cruise on the mighty Loch Ness one of the largest lochs in Scotland and famous for the tale of the Loch Ness monster.
- Drive to Fort Augustus, famous for spectacular views down Loch Ness and is a paradise for keen walkers.
- Overnight in Strathclyde / Glasgow.

**Day 9:** Glasgow
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Best of Kenya and Tanzania Migration (Joining Direct Only)' package is a 9-day tour covering Nairobi, Masai Mara, Serengeti, and Ngorongoro. - Meet local representative outside the baggage hall and proceed to the hotel.

- Enjoy an afternoon game drive and visit the local markets and villages.

**Day 3:** Masai Mara
- Enjoy a full day of game-viewing at Masai Mara.
- Visit the local markets and villages and enjoy the scenic views of the reserve.

- Drive to Isebania Border with packed lunch boxes.
- Clear with immigrations and exchange vehicles.

**Day 5:** Serengeti
- Enjoy an exciting full day game drive at Serengeti.
- Visit the local markets and villages and enjoy the scenic views of the reserve.

**Day 6:** Ngorongoro
- Drive to Ngorongoro and visit the famous crater.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the crater and visit the local markets and villages.

**Day 7:** Ngorongoro
- Enjoy a guided tour of the crater and visit the local markets and villages.
- Visit the famous Serengeti Migration and enjoy the scenic views of the reserve.

**Day 8:** Nairobi
- Drive to Nairobi and visit the local markets and villages.
- Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 9:** Departure
- Drive to the airport and depart for home with wonderful memories of your Kenya and Tanzania tour.

**Summary:** The 'Classical Greece (Fixed Departures)' package is an 8-day tour covering Athens, Olympia, Delphi, and Santorini. The itinerary includes visits to the Acropolis, Epidaurus, Mycenae, Olympia, Delphi, and Santorini, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ferry rides, and visits to ancient ruins and historical sites.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Athens
- Arrive at Athens International Airport and meet a local representative.
- Private transfer to the hotel.
- Check-in procedures and free time for optional or relaxing activities.

**Day 2:** Olympia
- Drive to Olympia through Central Peloponnese and the towns of Tripolis and Megalopolis.
- Visit the Archaeological Site with the Sanctuary of Olympian Zeus, the Ancient Stadium, and the Archaeological Museum.
- Overnight in Olympia.

**Day 3:** Delphi
- Drive to Delphi and visit the Archaeological Site and the Museum.
- A couple of hours free time in Delphi before departing.
- Overnight in Delphi.

**Day 4:** Athens
- Drive back to Athens via Levadia and Thebes.
- Arrive in Athens early in the evening.
- Overnight in Athens.

**Day 5:** Santorini
- Drive to Piraeus port for sailing to Santorini.
- Arrive in Santorini and avail the shared transfer to the hotel.
- Rest of the day is yours to spend in order to explore the island and admire the breathtaking view.

**Day 6:** Santorini
- Enjoy a Full Day Caldera cruise with the below itinerary.
- The bus will pick you up from your village’s meeting point going to Athinios port!
- The first stop of the excursion is the volcano of Santorini in Nea Kameni Island!
- The second stop is Palia Kameni Island, where you have the opportunity to swim in the hot springs of Caldera created by the volcano’s underwater power!
- Going to Thirassia Island the boat sails above underwater craters!
- In Thirassia Island you will have the time to eat in the small traditional taverns, swim in the crystal clear waters and visit the village of Manolas on the top of the cliff!
- After a sailing under the slopes of Oia you will be disembarked at Athinios port, where the buses will be waiting for you and you will be transferred to Oia village.

**Day 7:** Athens
- Drive to Piraeus port for your onward journey to Athens.
- Upon arrival at Athens, you will be transferred to the hotel.
- Overnight in Athens.

**Day 8:** Departure from Athens
- Breakfast at the hotel, check-out formalities, and free time depending on the flight back home.
- Private transfer from the hotel to Athens Airport.

**Summary:** The 'Japan With Korea Extravaganza (Summer 2024)' package is a 13-day tour covering Japan and South Korea. The itinerary includes visits to Narita, Tokyo, Hamamatsu, Osaka, Seoul, and Busan. Participants will enjoy guided tours, visits to famous landmarks, and experiences of Japanese and Korean culture, including a visit to the Asahi Super Dry Museum, a tour of the Jaxa Space Center, a visit to the Tokyo Skytree, and a DMZ tour in South Korea. The tour also includes experiences of Japanese and Korean cuisine, including sushi tasting and a visit to a local restaurant. The tour price includes return economy class airfare, accommodation at the hotels specified above or similar, visa and airport taxes, services of a professional and multilingual tour manager/local representative, and meals as mentioned in the itinerary. The tour price does not include compulsory tips for tour guide and driver, cost of deviation, city tax or tourism tax, visa charges for NRI passengers, cruise gratuity, and cost of basic travel quota equivalent to USD 10,000. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Narita, Meals: Dinner, Description: Arrive at Narita
Upon arrival, welcome by the Tour Manager/local tour guide and transfer from the airport to the hotel for check in. (Standard check in time 1400-1500 hrs).
Dinner at Indian Restaurant.
Note: Joining direct passenger / NRI can check-in on your own at the hotel. The standard check-in time is 1500 hrs. Packed dinner will be provided in case of late arrivals of flight or long queue at the immigration., GeoLocation: (Lat: 35.77, Lon: 140.31).

**Day 2:** Tokyo, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Asahi Super Dry Museum – Photostop At Ushiku Great Buddha – Visit Jaxa Space Center – Drive Pass Shibuya Crossing
After breakfast, we proceed to Asahi Super Dry Museum where you will be taken through the entire brewing process, capped by a tasting of Asahi Super Dry beer.
Refresh yourself with a beer or soft drink at Asahi Super Dry Museum. (What’s More)
Later, we visit Ushiku Great Buddha which is one of the tallest statues in the world and at 120m is the tallest Buddhist statue in Japan. We then proceed to Jaxa Space Center. This facility is at the heart of space research and exploration in Japan. It is also responsible for research and development on satellites, rockets, and tracking and controlling satellites in operation. We then drive pass through the the busiest crossing in Tokyo known as Shibuya Crossing.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 35.709026, Lon: 139.731992).

**Day 3:** Tokyo, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Hie Shrine – Visit Tokyo Skytree (350 m) – Visit Asakusa Kannon Temple and Nakamise Dori Street – Visit Team Labs
After breakfast, we proceed to Hie Shrine which is one of the major shrines of Tokyo. We then proceed to Tokyo Skytree which has magnificent observation decks, but first and foremost, it is Tokyo's radio tower. We then visit Asakusa Kannon which is one of Tokyo's most colorful and popular temples and Nakamise Dori street which is one of Japan's oldest shopping streets.
Later, we proceed to Team Labs, which is a popular, immersive museum known for its colorful, futuristic digital art installations & photo ops.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant.
Roll Cake Tasting. (What’s More), GeoLocation: (Lat: 35.709026, Lon: 139.731992).

**Day 4:** Hamamatsu, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Lake Ashi Cruise – Owakudani Ropeway – Visit Owakudani Valley – Visit Mt. Fuji 5th Station (All sightseeing are Weather permitting)
After breakfast, we check out and proceed to Mount Fuji. We take the Lake Ashi cruise and Owakudani ropeway and visit the Owakudani Valley. Later we visit Mt. Fuji 5th station, where you can see the highest mountain in Japan, listed as the World Heritage Site.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 34.7103, Lon: 137.7274).

**Day 5:** Osaka, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Kinkakuji Temple – Visit Arashiyama Bamboo Forest – Experience Japanese Tea Ceremony
After breakfast, we visit the Kinkaku-ji Temple - a pagoda made to house the sacred relics of the Buddha which has given this temple the popular name of Kinkaku-ji (“Temple of the Golden Pavilion”). We then visit the world famous Arashiyama Bamboo Forest where the thick green bamboo stalks seem to continue endlessly in every direction and Visitors can stroll paths lined with endless rows of towering bamboo. Later, experience the famous Japanese Tea Ceremony which is a Japanese cultural activity involving the ceremonial preparation & presentation of “MATCHA” powdered green tea.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 34.693738, Lon: 135.502165).

**Day 6:** Osaka, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Nara & Deer Park – Visit Todaiji Temple – Photostop at Osaka Castle – Free Time at Shinsaibashi
After breakfast, we visit Nara & Deer Park which is home to hundreds of freely roaming deer also known as “Messengers of God” and the Todaiji temple where you can see the temple’s best known relic “Daibutsu”. We then proceed for a photostop at the Osaka Castle - one of the most famous landmarks in Japan. In the evening, we visit Shinsaibashi - one of the most famous shopping streets in Osaka and Japan.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant with Sushi Tasting. (What’s More), GeoLocation: (Lat: 34.693738, Lon: 135.502165).

**Day 7:** Osaka, Meals: Packed Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Day Trip to Hiroshima – Bullet Train Experience (Osaka – Hiroshima – Osaka) – Visit Miyajima Island – Visit Itsukushima Shrine – Photostop at the Floating Tori Gate – Photostop at Atomic Dome – Visit Peace Memorial Park and Museum
Collect Packed Breakfast and proceed for a Day Trip to Hirsohima.
Today, we take a bullet train ride from Osaka to Hiroshima. Upon arrival in Hirsohima, we proceed to the pier to take the ferry to the Miyajima Island and visit the Itsukushima Shrine, the centuries-old Itsukushima Shrine on Miyajima, the shrine is known worldwide for its iconic “Floating Tori (Gate)”. Later, we visit the Hiroshima Peace Park, Museum and the Atomic Bomb Dome (Genbaku Dome) which is a part of the Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park and a designated UNESCO World Heritage. We return to Osaka via a bullet train from Hiroshima.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 34.693738, Lon: 135.502165).

**Day 8:** Seoul, Meals: Breakfast and Dinner, Description: Seoul - Osaka
After breakfast, we check out from the hotel and proceed to the airport for your flight to South Korea. Welcome to South Korea, the country now super popular because of the K-POP culture, K Dramas and centuries of the history. Arrive at Incheon International airport and you will be met and transferred to your hotel and check in. (Standard check in time 1400-1500 hrs)., GeoLocation: (Lat: 37.566535, Lon: 126.977969).

**Day 9:** Seoul, Meals: Breakfast, Lunch and Dinner, Description: Visit Gyeongbokgung Palace - Visit K star road – Visit Lotte World Tower SeoulSky Observatory - Free Time at Myeongdong
After breakfast, we proceed to Gyeongbokgung Palace - an architectural masterpiece in the pagoda style. We then visit K Star Road, notable with its densely located Korean famous entertainment companies, which have led the driving force of K-pop.
Experience Hanbok Costume Wearing at Gyeongbokgung Palace. (What’s More)
Later, visit Lotte World Tower SeoulSky Observatory, South Korea's tallest building which offers a panoramic view of the entire capital city, beautiful both day and night. In the evening, we visit Myeongdong is a popular tourist spot for shopping and street food.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 37.566535, Lon: 126.977969).

**Day 10:** Seoul, Meals: Packed Breakfast, Local Lunch and Dinner, Description: DMZ Tour – Visit Hyundai Motor Studio
Collect Packed Breakfast and proceed for DMZ Tour. (Since this is a government location everything is subject to availability & dependent on government rules for the day)

Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 37.566535, Lon: 126.977969).

After breakfast, we take a bullet train ride from Seoul to Busan. Upon arrival in Busan, we visit Songdo Bay Station. We take a cable car ride where we witness the beauty of Busan from above. Later, we visit Haedong Yonggungsa Seaside Temple which is the most popular temple in Busan. Its location right by the sea makes it unique in South Korea.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant., GeoLocation: (Lat: 37.566535, Lon: 126.977969).

After breakfast, we visit Garden of Morning Calm - known for its serene and picturesque beauty, making it a perfect escape from the bustling city life. Later, we proceed to Nami Island which is full of attractive landscapes and was used as the filming location for the famous Korean drama “Winter Sonata” and Petite France - a little vibrant French village that stands out with its brightly colored buildings.
Dinner at Indian Restaurant.
 , GeoLocation: (Lat: 37.566535, Lon: 126.977969).

Today, we check out and proceed to the airport for your flight back home. It’s time to say goodbye to all the new friends you have made. We hope you take back many happy memories of your holiday. **Summary:** The 'Beautiful Cambodia' package is a 5-day tour covering Phnom Penh and Siem Reap. The itinerary includes visits to the Royal Palace, Silver Pagoda, Chong Kneas floating village, Angkor Wat temple, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat rides, and visits to local markets and workshops. The package includes daily breakfast, bus ticket from Phnom Penh to Siem Reap, and local English-speaking guide.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Phnom Penh
- Welcome to Phnom Penh - the city retains its traditional Khmer and colonial styles with French villas and large tree-line sidewalk!
- Explore the Royal Palace and the Silver Pagoda, the official residence of the King of Cambodia.
- Visit the sacred hill Phnom Daun Penh and the river-front park where 4 rivers met at a junction.

**Day 2:** Siem Reap
- Drive to Siem Reap and visit Chong Kneas floating village, located 10 kilometers south of Siem Reap.
- Take a ride in a traditional wooden boat on the Tonle Sap, the "Great Lake" of Cambodia and the largest in Asia.
- Visit Senteurs D'Angkor New Workshop and discover how local artisans make by hand: soap with coconut oil, natural cosmetics, subtly scented balms, aromatic candles.

**Day 3:** Siem Reap
- Visit Angkor Wat temple, the Cambodia's ancient temple is one of the wonders of the oriental world.
- Explore South Gate of Angkor Thom, the famous Bayon Temple, the Terrace of the Elephants, and the Royal Palace Area.
- Visit Ta Prohm temple, a wonderful combination of human genius and natural beauty.

**Day 4:** Siem Reap
- Visit Wat Bo, a highly respected pagoda founded in the 18th century, contains very unique wall paintings of the Reamker (Ramayana).
- Explore the lively open market, Psar Chars, also called the “Old Market”, where anything and everything is for sale.

**Day 5:** Siem Reap
- Breakfast at hotel.
- You are free at leisure time to visit around until time to check out and then transfer you to the airport for your return flight. Pack your luggage and unforgettable memories. Have a safe flight to come back home and see you later.

**Summary:** The 'Marvels of Cambodia' package is a 6-day tour covering Siem Reap and Phnom Penh. The itinerary includes visits to Angkor Wat, Ta Prohm, Bayon Temple, Banteay Srei, and other ancient temples, as well as the National Museum of Cambodia, Toul Sleng Genocidal Museum, and the Royal Palace. Participants will enjoy guided tours, bus transfers, and visits to local markets.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Siem Reap
- Arrive in Siem Reap and visit Wat Bo, a highly respected pagoda founded in the 18th century.
- Visit Senteurs D'Angkor New Workshop and explore the local artisans' creations.
- Visit Psar Chars, also called the “Old Market”, where anything and everything is for sale.

**Day 2:** Siem Reap
- Visit the ancient capital of Angkor Thom, including the South Gate, Bayon Temple, and the Royal Enclosure.
- Visit Ta Prohm, a jungle-covered temple famous for its massive fig trees and gigantic creepers.
- Visit Angkor Wat, a massive temple complex with galleries, libraries, pavilions, courtyards, and ponds.

**Day 3:** Siem Reap
- Visit Takeo temple, a mountain temple built in pyramid shape to represent Mount Meru.
- Visit Preah Khan, a Buddhist temple built by King Jayavarman VII.
- Visit Neak Pean, a delicate highlight of Khmer art.
- Visit Ta Som, a small classic Bayon style monastic complex.
- Visit Banteay Kdei, a Buddhist temple set in a peaceful and quiet place.

**Day 4:** Phnom Penh
- Take a bus to Phnom Penh and visit the National Museum of Cambodia.
- Visit Toul Sleng Genocidal Museum, a memorial site of the S-21 interrogation and detention center.
- Visit the Royal Palace and the Silver Pagoda, the official residence of the King of Cambodia.

**Day 5:** Phnom Penh
- Visit Phnom Daun Penh, a sacred hill with a pagoda and a name that is also the name of the capital.
- Visit Central Market, a large market constructed in 1937 with countless stalls of goods.
- Enjoy a free day at leisure.

**Day 6:** Phnom Penh
- Check out of the hotel and transfer to the airport for your return flight.

**Summary:** The 'Great Barrier Reef Drive' package is a 5-day self-drive tour covering Port Douglas and Cairns. - Drive to Port Douglas and visit Hartley's Crocodile Adventure.
- Enjoy a guided tour and learn about the crocodiles and their habitat.

**Day 3:** Port Douglas
- Drive to Daintree Rainforest and visit the area.
- Enjoy a guided tour and learn about the rainforest and its unique features.

**Day 4:** Port Douglas

**Summary:** The 'Joyful Vietnam' package is a 6-day tour covering Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, and Da Nang. The itinerary includes visits to Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature, Hoan Kiem Lake, Old Quarter of Hanoi, Cam Thanh coconut village, Bay Mau coconut forest, Hoi An Ancient town, Ba Na Hills, and Fantasy Park, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to local markets and handicraft villages.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Hanoi Arrival – City Tour
- Welcome to Hanoi, the capital of Vietnam
- Visit Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature, and Hoan Kiem Lake
- Explore the Old Quarter of Hanoi, a fascinating network of narrow alleys and shophouses
- Overnight in Hanoi

**Day 2:** Hanoi – Ha Long Bay – Overnight on Cruise
- Drive to Ha Long Bay, a Natural World Heritage as recognized by UNESCO
- Enjoy a warm welcome from cruise staff and complete the check-in procedure for the overnight cruise
- Visit the Grottos, stop for swimming or kayaking, pass floating houses, and approach islets to enjoy their beauty in close proximity
- Overnight on the cruise

**Day 3:** Ha Long Bay – Hanoi – Flight to Da Nang
- Wake up early to enjoy the dawn on the sea in the early morning
- Check out your room and have brunch on board while the cruise coming back the pier
- Disembark from the cruise, return to Hanoi by shuttle bus
- Transfer to Noi Bai airport for your flight to Da Nang city (air tickets excluded)

**Day 4:** Da Nang – Cam Thanh coconut village – Hoi An Ancient town
- Visit Cam Thanh village and Bay Mau coconut forest
- Learn about traditional handicrafts by watching local artisans weave baskets and mats using coconut leaves and other natural materials
- Explore Hoi An Ancient Town, a magical world of Oriental feel
- Walk over the Japanese Bridge, visit Chinese Assembly halls, and explore ancient houses
- Overnight in Da Nang

**Day 5:** Da Nang – Ba Na Hills – Danang
- Visit Ba Na Hills, a French-inspired hilltop resort
- Take the iconic cable car to the Ba Na Hills station
- Visit the Linh Ung Pagoda, home to a 27-meter-high Buddha statue
- Enjoy the panorama view of the Da Nang City and Da Nang Bay
- Visit Fantasy Park, join in adventurous, fun, and modern games
- Overnight in Da Nang

**Day 6:** Departure Da Nang
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel
- Free at leisure time to visit around until time to check out
- Transfer to the airport for your return flight

**Summary:** The 'Astonishing Vietnam 7N/8D' package is a 7-night, 8-day tour covering Hanoi, Ha Long Bay, Da Nang, and Ho Chi Minh City. The itinerary includes visits to Ba Dinh Square, Ho Chi Minh Mausoleum, Temple of Literature, Hoan Kiem Lake, Old Quarter, Cam Thanh coconut village, Hoi An Ancient town, Ba Na Hills, Cu Chi tunnels, War Remnants Museum, Reunification Palace, and Ben Thanh Market, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to local markets and historical sites.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Hanoi arrival – City Tour
- Welcome to Hanoi! -  the capital of Vietnam, is a bustling metropolis with a rich history and culture.
- Visit Ba Dinh Square, the largest square in Hanoi, and the Temple of Literature, Vietnam's first university.
- Walk around Hoan Kiem Lake and the Old Quarter of Hanoi.

**Day 2:** Hanoi - Halong bay – Overnight on cruise - (Shuttle Bus)
- Breakfast at the hotel, then check out, you will be picked up at your hotel in Hanoi Old Quarters and transferred to Ha Long Bay.
- Enjoy a warm welcome from cruise staff and complete the check-in procedure for the overnight cruise to discover the magnificent beauty of this "Descending Dragon" bay.
- Visit the Grottos, stop for swimming or kayaking, pass floating houses, and approach islets to enjoy their beauty in close proximity.

**Day 3:** Halong – Hanoi – Danang – (Shuttle Bus) (Air Fare is not included)
- Breakfast at hotel.
- Disembark from the cruise, return to Hanoi by shuttle bus.
- Then private driver pick you up from Hanoi and transfer to Noi Bai airport (without tour guide) for your flight to Danang city (air tickets excluded).

**Day 4:** Danang - Cam Thanh coconut village – Hoi An Ancient town
- Breakfast at the hotel, then check out, you will be picked up at your hotel in Danang and transferred to Cam Thanh village.
- Visit Cam Thanh village and Bay Mau coconut forest.
- In the afternoon, after our transfer to Hoi An Ancient Town, we will be immersed in a magical world of Oriental feel.

**Day 5:** Danang - Ba Na Hills – Danang – (SIC Basis)
- Breakfast at the hotel, then check out, you will be picked up at your hotel in Danang and transferred to Ba Na Hills.
- Visit the iconic Golden Bridge, Linh Ung Pagoda, and Loc Uyen Garden.
- Enjoy the panorama view of the Da Nang City and Da Nang Bay.

**Day 6:** Danang - Morning flight to Saigon (Flight tickets not included)  - Afternoon city tour
- Breakfast at the hotel, then check out, you will be picked up at your hotel in Danang and transferred to the airport (without tour guide) for your short flight to Ho Chi Minh city (air tickets excluded).
- Upon arrival, you will be picked up and drive to hotel for checking in.
- In the afternoon, start your city tour at the War Remnants Museum and Reunification Palace.

**Day 7:** Saigon - Cu Chi tunnels – (SIC Basis)
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- You will be picked up from pick-up point in District 1 around 07:30-08:00 am.
- Morning drive to Cu Chi Tunnels: the network of over 200 km of tunnels became legendary when they played a vital role in the war.

**Day 8:** Saigon – Departure
- Breakfast at hotel.
- You are free at leisure time to visit around until time to check out and then transfer you to the airport for your return flight.

**Summary:** The 'Cosmos - Treasures of the Balkans & Transylvania' package is a 13-day tour covering Budapest, Belgrade, Sofia, Veliko Tarnovo, Bucharest, Brasov, and Cluj-Napoca. The itinerary includes visits to historic cities, medieval towns, and natural wonders, such as the Danube River, the Roman amphitheatre, and the Rila Monastery. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing excursions, and leisure time to explore the local culture and history.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Budapest, Hungary
- Check into your hotel.
- Take advantage of the CosmosGO app to visit Budapest at leisure.
- Meet your Tour Director and travel companions.

**Day 2:** Budapest
- Guided city tour of Budapest: Visit the Parliament building, Alexander Nevsky Cathedral, Boyana Church, and more.
- Enjoy leisure time to explore the city.

**Day 3:** Budapest to Belgrade, Serbia
- Travel to Serbia and visit Novi Sad, capital of the province.
- Continue to Belgrade and discover the capital of Serbia on a guided city sightseeing tour.

**Day 4:** Belgrade to Sofia, Bulgaria
- Cross the border into Bulgaria to arrive in the capital city of Sofia.
- Join a Local Guide for a city tour that includes the Parliament building, Alexander Nevsky Cathedral, Boyana Church, and more.

**Day 5:** Sofia
- Visit the Rila Monastery, a medieval Bulgarian orthodox church listed as a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
- Enjoy leisure time to explore the city.

**Day 6:** Sofia to Veliko Tarnovo
- Head eastwards to Plovdiv, Bulgaria’s second-largest city.
- Stop in Veliko Tarnovo, a medieval town located on the Yantra River.

**Day 7:** Veliko Tarnovo to Bucharest, Romania
- Travel to Bucharest and discover the city on a guided sightseeing tour.
- Visit the open-air Village Museum and other places of interest.

**Day 8:** Bucharest
- Visit the Sinaia Monastery and Peles Castle, considered among the most romantic castles in the world.
- Enjoy leisure time to explore the city.

**Day 9:** Bucharest to Brasov
- Travel to Brasov, a medieval town famous for its town square filled with Baroque architecture and outdoor cafes.
- Visit the Black Church and enjoy leisure time.

**Day 10:** Brasov
- Visit the legendary Dracula castle in Bran.
- Enjoy a walking orientation of the Old Town of Brasov.

**Day 11:** Brasov to Cluj-Napoca
- Stop in Sighisoara, a medieval town with 11 towers within the city walls.
- Continue to Cluj-Napoca, the film capital of Romania.

**Day 12:** Cluj-Napoca to Budapest
- Cross the border at Oradea into Hungary and return to Budapest.
- Enjoy leisure time to explore the city.

**Day 13:** Departure from Budapest
- Breakfast and departure from Budapest.

**Summary:** The 'Bhutan Charter Special Value - Ex Bangalore' package is an 8-day tour covering Thimphu, Punakha, and Paro. The itinerary includes visits to Buddha Dordenma, King's Memorial Chorten, Takin Preserve, Sangaygang view point, Zilukha Nunnery, Trashichhoedzong, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, farm house activities, and visits to local markets and craft bazaars.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Thimphu
- Arrive at Paro Airport and transfer to Thimphu.
- Check-in at the hotel and relax.
- Guided tour of Thimphu: Visit Buddha Dordenma, King's Memorial Chorten, and Takin Preserve.

**Day 2:** Thimphu
- Visit Sangaygang view point and Zilukha Nunnery.
- Explore Trashichhoedzong: This is the center of government and religion, site of monarch’s throne room and seat of Je Khenpo or Chief Abbot.
- Evening time can be spent strolling through Thimphu city centre, Ka Ja Throm (local market) and local crafts bazaar.

**Day 3:** Punakha
- Drive to Punakha descending back down from Dochu La.
- Visit Dochula Pass and the Chorten, Mani wall, and prayer flags.
- Check-in at the hotel and relax.

**Day 4:** Punakha
- Visit the Chimi Lhakhang, situated on a hillock in the centre of the valley, also known as the temple of fertility.
- Visit Punakha Dzong, the largest Dzong in Bhutan.
- Pass through the suspension bridge that sounds absolutely breathtaking!

**Day 5:** Paro
- Drive to Paro and visit Ta Dzong, originally built as Watchtower, which now houses National Museum.
- Visit Rinpung Dzong, meaning (“fortress of the heap of jewels”), which has a long and fascinating history.
- Overnight at the hotel in Paro.

**Day 6:** Paro
- Excursion to Taktshang Monastery (Approx 5 Hours Walk): It is one of the most famous of Bhutan’s monasteries, perched on the side of a cliff 900m above the Paro valley floor.
- Visit Drukgyel Dzong, a recently restored fortress where Bhutanese warriors fought Tibetan invaders centuries ago.
- Visit the 7th century Kyichu Lhakhang, one of the 108 temples built in the Himalayas by Tibetan King, Songtsen Gampo.

**Day 7:** Paro
- Visit the Ka Ja Throm (local market) to explore and purchase souvenirs for your loved ones.
- Participate in Farm house activities such as archery, cooking demonstrations, and enjoy lunch.
- Visit a brewery to observe the process of making local beer and indulge in a beer tasting session.

**Day 8:** Depart Paro
- After early breakfast at the hotel, drive to the airport for flight to your onward destination.

- Guided sightseeing: Visit the Plaza de Armas and the Government Palace.

**Summary:** The 'Hello Cairns (Summer)' package is a 3-day tour covering Cairns, Kuranda, and the Great Barrier Reef. **Summary:** The 'Lakshadweep - Wonders of Agatti' package is a 5-day tour to Agatti Island, Lakshadweep. **Summary:** The 'Lakshadweep - Awesome Agatti' package is a 4-day tour to Agatti Island, Lakshadweep. The itinerary includes visits to the Agatti museum, the Eastern Jetty, the Desalination Plant, the Blue Lagoon Beach, and the Fish Hatchery on Day 1. On Day 2, participants will enjoy an excursion to Thinnakara Island, where they can explore the island or engage in water sports activities. Day 3 is dedicated to an excursion to Rocky Island at Kalpitty, and on Day 4, participants will depart from Agatti Island after breakfast. The package includes 3N accommodation at a Beach Villa or similar, daily breakfast, lunch, and dinner, and all transfers and sightseeing in a non-AC vehicle. Travel insurance is also included for participants below 69 years.

**Summary:** The 'Mesmerizing Lakshadweep' package is a 6-day tour to the beautiful islands of Lakshadweep. The itinerary includes visits to Kavaratti Island, Agatti Island, and Thinnakara Island, where you can experience the island's natural beauty, explore the local culture, and enjoy water sports activities. Participants will also have the opportunity to visit the Agatti Museum, the Eastern Jetty, the Desalination Plant, and the Blue Lagoon Beach. The package includes accommodation in a hotel or similar category hotels/resorts, daily breakfast, lunch, and dinner, and all transfers and sightseeing in a non-AC vehicle. Travel insurance is also included for travelers below 69 years old. The package price is 35250.0.

**Summary:** The 'Sensational Swiss' package is a 6-day tour covering Lucerne, Interlaken, and Zurich. The itinerary includes visits to Mt. Titlis, Schilthorn, and a panoramic tour of Zurich. Participants will enjoy guided tours, train rides, and breathtaking views of the Swiss Alps. The package includes accommodation at selected hotels, daily continental breakfast, and sightseeing tours.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Lucerne
- Arrive in Zurich and transfer to Lucerne by train.
- Check-in at the hotel and explore Lucerne on your own.

**Day 2:** Lucerne
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit Mt. Titlis and enjoy the breathtaking views of the Swiss Alps.
- Return to Lucerne and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 3:** Interlaken
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Transfer to Interlaken by train.
- Check-in at the hotel and explore Interlaken on your own.

**Day 4:** Interlaken
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Visit Schilthorn and enjoy the panoramic views of the Swiss Alps.
- Return to Interlaken and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 5:** Zurich
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Transfer to Zurich by train.
- Enjoy a panoramic tour of Zurich and explore the city on your own.

**Day 6:** Departure from Zurich
- Breakfast at the hotel.
- Transfer to Zurich Airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Scenic Scandinavia with Rovaniemi (Summer 2024)' package is a 13-day tour covering Helsinki, Rovaniemi, Stockholm, Oslo, Bergen, and Copenhagen. The itinerary includes visits to Arktikum Museum, Reindeer farm, Husky Farm, Santa village, Tallinn, Alexander Nevsky Cathedral, Toompea Hill, Parliament building, Dome Church, St. Nicholas Church, Town Hall Square, and many other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, midnight sun phenomenon, Danube cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Helsinki
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Helsinki: See the Senate Square, visit Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, Sibelius Park and many more interesting sights.

**Day 2:** Rovaniemi
- Fly to Rovaneimi – Visit Arktikum Museum - Midnight Sun Special
- Tonight, experience the Midnight Sun phenomenon. Ride around the surroundings of Lapland to observe the midnight sun.

**Day 3:** Rovaniemi
- Visit Reindeer farm – Visit husky Farm – Visit Santa village
- Meet the authentic reindeer herder and take photos of the reindeer. Next, we visit the Santa Claus Village and the numerous souvenir shops, Santa's Post Office and surely, we get to meet the man himself in his office.

**Day 4:** Helsinki
- Fly back to Helsinki.
- Note: Today the group will be joining the Scandinavian Extravaganza guests.

**Day 5:** Helsinki
- Day trip to Tallinn – Guided City Tour of Tallinn
- Today, we drive to the pier to take a ferry to Tallinn, Estonia's capital on the Baltic Sea. On arrival, we proceed for a Guided City Tour of Tallinn: See the Toompea Hill, Parliament building, Dome Church, St. Nicholas Church, Town Hall Square. Next, we visit the Alexander Nevsky Cathedral. Later, we drive to the pier to take the ferry back to Helsinki.

**Day 6:** On Board Silja Or Viking
- Guided City Tour of Helsinki – Board Cruise to Stockholm.
- Today, we proceed on a Guided City Tour of Helsinki: See the Senate Square, visit Lutheran Tempelliauki Church, Sibelius Park and many more interesting sights. Next, Visit Fazer experience centre and learn the art of chocolate making including chocolate tasting. Later, we board the cruise across the Baltic Sea to Stockholm.

**Day 7:** Stockholm
- Guided City Tour of Stockholm – Visit famous Vasa Museum 
- Today, we proceed on a Guided City Tour of Stockholm: See the Opera House, Alfred Nobel's House and the Royal Palace. Also, we visit the Stockholm Concert Hall - venue of the Nobel Prize award. Next, we visit Vasa Museum - Sweden's most visited museum enshrining the warship, Vasa. Later, we spend some free time in Gamla Stan – the old Town.

**Day 8:** Oslo
- Onto Oslo – Visit the town of Karlstad
- Today we drive to Oslo. Enroute, we visit the town of Karlstad, situated on the northern shores of Lake Vanern, for a photo stop at Lake Vanern – the largest lake of Sweden.

**Day 9:** Oslo
- Guided Tour of Oslo – Visit Fram Museum – Photostop at Holmenkollen Ski Jump
- Today, we proceed for a guided city tour of Oslo: See the Parliament Square, National Galleries, Karl Johan shopping street, the Royal Palace and Akhershus Fortress. Next, we visit Vigeland Sculpture Park and the Fram Museum, learn the story of Norwegian polar exploration. Later we take a Photostop at Holmenkollen Ski Jump.

**Day 10:** Bergen
- Travel on one of Norway’s most popular trips ‘Norway in a nutshell’. A combination of spectacular train rides and impressive trips by bus ‘Norway in a nutshell’:
- Today, we drive to Geilo station. Board our train to Myrdal, change to the Flam railway line, for a scenic travel to Flam. We wander around the idyllic countryside, before driving to Bergen we take a photo-stop at viewpoint Stegastein.

**Day 11:** Copenhagen
- Guided city tour of Bergen – Ride on the Funicular train – Fly to Copenhagen
- Today, we proceed for a guided city tour of Bergen: See the Hanseatic wharf Bryggen with its pastel – coloured wooden houses, winding cobblestone streets and old Bergen. Next, we take a ride on the Funicular train, to the top of the Mount Floyen for an aerial view of Bergen. Later, we fly to Copenhagen.  
Note: In case the internal flight arrival into Copenhagen is late in the evening, packed dinner will be served.

**Day 12:** Copenhagen
- Guided City Tour of Copenhagen – Canal Cruise – Oresund Bridge
- Today, we proceed for a guided City Tour of Copenhagen: See the Parliament building, Amalienborg Palace, Gefion fountain, Little Mermaid statue and many other interesting sights. Next, we drive on the Oresund Bridge which is the second longest bridge in Europe with both roadway and railway combined in a single structure, running nearly 8 kilometres.

**Day 13:** Copenhagen
- Fly back home with pleasant memories!
- Today, we proceed to the airport for your flight back home. Kindly spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager. Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated. Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Europe tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

**Summary:** The 'Explore Saigon' package is a 5-day tour covering the vibrant city of Saigon, Vietnam. The itinerary includes visits to the War Remnants Museum, Reunification Palace, Ben Thanh Market, Cu Chi Tunnels, and Vung Tau beach. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to local markets and historical landmarks. The package includes 4 nights' accommodation in Saigon, meals as mentioned in the itinerary, all tours and transfers, entrance fees, and sightseeing as mentioned in the itinerary. The price is 28294.0, and the package is valid for minimum 02 adults traveling together at all times.

**Summary:** The 'Western Delights With National Parks' package is a 13-day tour covering San Francisco, Los Angeles, Las Vegas, Kanab, Moab, Salt Lake City, and Yellowstone National Park. The itinerary includes visits to the Golden Gate Bridge, Solvang, Universal Studios, Las Vegas High Roller, Zion National Park, Bryce Canyon, Antelope Canyon, Monument Valley, Arches National Park, and Grand Teton National Park, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city sightseeing, and visits to national parks and monuments.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to San Francisco
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of San Francisco: See the Civic Centre, Union square, Fisherman’s Wharf and visit Twin Peaks.

**Day 2:** San Francisco
- Proceed for a guided city tour of San Francisco: Enjoy Bay Cruise - Visit Sausalito.
- Visit the town of Sausalito, the most well-known waterfront community in California.

**Day 3:** Los Angeles
- Drive to Los Angeles and visit Solvang - "A little Denmark in Southern California".
- Visit the Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches.

**Day 4:** Los Angeles
- Visit Universal Studios, the work place of Hollywood’s biggest and most glamorous stars.
- Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more.
- Experience the ‘Wizarding World of Harry Potter’.

**Day 5:** Las Vegas
- Drive to Las Vegas and visit the Las Vegas High Roller.
- Explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas
- Visit the Majestic Grand Canyon –Open Bus tour to experience Las Vegas by Night.
- Cruise the Las Vegas Strip in an open bus to see top Las Vegas sights lit by dazzling neon lights.

**Day 7:** Kanab
- Drive to Kanab and visit Zion National Park in Utah.
- Marvel at dramatic landscape of colourful deep canyons, high cliffs, mesas, forested plateaus and spectacular natural rock arches.

**Day 8:** Moab
- Drive to Moab and visit Bryce Canyon.
- Visit the world’s largest collection of “hoodoos’ the distinctive rock formations.

**Day 9:** Moab
- Visit Antelope Canyon and Monument Valley.
- See the stunning colors & formations of Antelope Canyon and the majestic rock formations of Monument Valley.

**Day 10:** Salt Lake City
- Drive to Salt Lake City and visit Arches National Park.
- See the natural thermal wonders like Old Faithful Geyser in all its glory.

**Day 11:** Yellowstone National Park
- Drive to Yellowstone National Park and visit Grand Teton National Park.
- See the magnificent Teton Range being the center of attention.

**Day 12:** Yellowstone National Park
- Proceed on a full day tour of the Lower Loop.
- See the natural thermal wonders like Old Faithful Geyser in all its glory.

**Day 13:** Yellowstone National Park
- Bid farewell.
- Proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end.

**Summary:** The 'Australian Extravaganza (Summer)' package is an 11-day tour covering Melbourne, Cairns, Tangalooma, Gold Coast, and Sydney. The itinerary includes visits to the Great Ocean Road, Kuranda Rainforest, Great Barrier Reef, Tangalooma Island Resort, and Sydney Opera House, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Melbourne
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Melbourne: See the Royal Botanical Gardens, Town Hall, St. Patrick’s Cathedral, National Tennis centre, the 1956 Olympic venue, the Shrine of Remembrance, Bourke Street Mall and some beautifully restored Victorian houses.

**Day 2:** Melbourne
- Enjoy a memorable excursion to the Great Ocean Road.
- Enjoy local lunch.
- Drive along the coastline of Port Campbell National Park.
- The coastline with its twisted shapes of amazing rock formation, the famous ‘Twelve Apostles’ – huge stone pillars rising from the surf, the Loch Ard Gorge.

**Day 3:** Cairns
- Flight to Cairns.
- Onto Cairns – The Tropical Paradise.
- Today, get set for a day of fun and excitement as you visit Kuranda - a village in the rainforest.
- Experience one way Skyrail journey that immerses you in an intimate experience where you will relax and enjoy the stunning rainforest scenery, panoramic views of the Cairns tropical region and the glittering waters of the Coral Sea.

**Day 4:** Cairns
- Join us on an unforgettable experience to the Great Barrier Reef – the only living structure visible from the space.
- A chance to enjoy Hot Air Ballooning.
- This morning you have an option to go for hot air ballooning (Boxed Breakfast).
- Later after an early breakfast at your hotel, we proceed to board the cruise to the Green Island.
- Escape into a world of surprises to experience the breathtaking beauty of the Great Barrier Reef.
- There is an abundance of activities for swimmers and non-swimmers to enjoy.
- A chance to Snorkel and dive, or you can stay dry and explore the stunning reef from the comfort of an air-conditioned semi-submersible that will take you to an underwater world that has a dazzling kaleidoscope of colours.

**Day 5:** Tangalooma
- Flight to Brisbane.
- Orientation tour of Brisbane covering Town Hall, Kangaroo Point and the South bank waterfront.
- Later proceed to Holt Street Wharf and take a 75 Mins catamaran cruise to Tangalooma Island Resort which is the perfect for a family holiday destination for seeking an understated yet unique adventure, educational or nature based experience - right on Brisbane’s doorstep on the incredible Moreton Island.
- Protected and treasured, this is nature’s theme park where amazing natural encounters are just part of the everyday experience.
- With heaps of tours and activities on offer, Tangalooma is the jewel of Moreton Bay and islands.
- Evening enjoy the highlight of any visit to Tangalooma; which is the opportunity to hand feed one of the wild bottlenose dolphins that visit the shores each evening at sunset.

**Day 6:** Tangalooma
- Marine Discovery Cruise and Desert Safari
- This morning post breakfast take the Tangalooma Island Resort Marine Discovery Cruise which cruises out past the wrecks in search of dolphins, dugongs, turtles and more!
- Go further than land can take you and enjoy a cruise along the Moreton Bay Regions protected marine park.
- As we motor along the bay in our pontoon boat you are able to see the marine life beneath the surface.
- Our knowledgeable guides will tell you all about the island and its surrounds.
- Next, do you feel the need for speed? Take a journey to the Tangalooma Desert as part of this thrilling and bumping 4WD bus tour where getting there is half the fun.
- Guests will receive a unique look into the heart of Moreton Island and then participate in the exhilarating sport of Moreton Island sand tobogganing, reaching speeds of up to 40km per hour!

**Day 7:** Gold Coast
- Flight to Gold Coast.
- Proceed to the SkyPoint Observation Deck.
- Exciting day at Dreamworld - theme park and zoo
- After an American breakfast at the hotel, get set for a day of fun and excitement as you visit Dreamworld - whether you're a thrill-seeker, a wildlife-lover or prefer a more relaxed ride or slide, Dreamworld and have the perfect experience for you!
- Enjoy Thrill rides: Tail Spin, Tower of Terror II, The Giant Drop, BuzzSaw, Hot Wheels SideWinder, Mick Doohan’s Motocoaster, Pandamonium, The Claw & many more attractions.
- Later proceed to Sky Point observation Deck.
- SkyPoint is an observation deck located 230 metres off the ground at the top of the Q1 on the Gold Coast.
- Skypoint Observation Deck is Australia’s only beachside observation deck.
- Take in expansive views of the Gold Coast coastline, the Gold Coast Hinterlands, and the Pacific Ocean from Australia’s tallest building.

**Day 8:** Sydney
- Flight to Sydney.
- Explore the landmarks of Sydney - the Rocks area, Harbour Bridge, Bondi Beach on your exciting city tour.
- Visit the Sydney Tower
- After an American breakfast at the hotel, check-out & proceed to Brisbane airport to take your flight to Sydney.
- On arrival proceed on an exciting city tour of Sydney which includes highlights like the Darling Harbour, one of the world’s greatest waterfront destinations; experience a slice of the city’s history at the Rocks area, the busy CBD area, Hyde Park, the Harbour Bridge, Mrs. Macquaries Chair and the world renowned Bondi beach.
- Later visit the Sydney Tower to view the spectacular view of the city.

**Day 9:** Sydney
- Enjoy a spectacular guided tour of the world-renowned Sydney Opera house.
- Fun filled Jet Boat ride.
- Guided tour of Sydney Cricket Ground
- After breakfast proceed on a guided tour of one the world’s most spectacular landmark – the Sydney Opera House.
- Proceed for the guided Sydney Cricket Ground - A fascinating, behind the scenes walking tour of Sydney’s home of sport.
- Stand where the sporting heroes play cricket, rugby, football, and AFL.
- Hear entertaining stories of players, spectators, and events.
- Next have some fun and excitement as you enjoy 360° spin, on a high speed drifting Jet Boat ride on the waters of Sydney.

**Day 10:** Sydney
- Blue Mountains tour.
- Harbour Cruise Sydney
- After an American breakfast at the hotel, experience the spectacular blue-hazed beauty, dramatic cliffs and deep canyons of the Blue Mountains.
- Tonight be captivated by the breath-taking scenery as you sail through the Sydney Harbour Cruise with its mesmerizing panorama of bright city lights, Opera House and the famous Harbour Bridge.
- Experience the beautiful Harbour cruise with 1 cocktail or champagne and Indian snack.
- Enjoy Indian dinner at local restaurant.

**Day 11:** Sydney
- Fly back with pleasant memories.
- After buffet/boxed breakfast, we check out and proceed to the airport for your flight back home.
- Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager.
- Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated.
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Australian Extravaganza tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.

- Proceed for a guided city tour of San Francisco: Enjoy Bay Cruise - Visit Sausalito.

- Visit the Santa Monica Beach an iconic example of the famed Southern California beaches.

- Visit Universal Studios, the work place of Hollywood’s biggest and most glamorous stars.
- Enjoy rides like Transformers 3D, Jurassic park, Revenge of the Mummy and more.

- Drive to Las Vegas and visit the Las Vegas High Roller.
- Explore the grandeur of your own hotel or you can just walk along the Las Vegas Boulevard - the main street.

**Day 6:** Las Vegas
- Visit the Majestic Grand Canyon –Open Bus tour to experience Las Vegas by Night.
- Visit the Fremont Street Experience - a dazzling display on the world’s largest TV screen with over a million light bulbs covering three city blocks!

**Day 7:** Kanab
- Drive to Kanab and visit Zion National Park in Utah.
- Marvel at dramatic landscape of colourful deep canyons, high cliffs, mesas, forested plateaus and spectacular natural rock arches.

- Visit Antelope Canyon and see the stunning colors & formations.
- Proceed to Monument Valley and see the sky, bigger and bluer than you remembered.

**Day 9:** Salt Lake City
- Visit Arches National Park which contains about 2,000 windowed arches, towering spires, harrowing hoodoos and precarious pinnacles.

- Visit Grand Teton National Park - one of the most scenic national parks in the world, with the magnificent Teton Range being the center of attention.
- Proceed to Yellowstone National Park and see Signal Mountain, Jackson Lake, Willow Flats, Elk Ranch Flats, Snake River Overlook, and many more.

- Visit the Lower Loop, which offers most popular attractions.

**Day 12:** Niagara Falls
- Fly to Buffalo and drive to Niagara Falls.
- Check in at the hotel and proceed to visit Niagara Falls by night.

**Day 13:** Niagara Falls
- Visit the Maid of the Mist, the only way to experience one of the world’s most iconic natural wonder.
- Proceed to Harrisburg and visit Hershey’s Chocolate World a place to experience the chocolate making adventure.

**Day 14:** Washington D.C.
- Visit the Smithsonian National Natural History Museum.
- Proceed on Guided City tour of Washington D.C.; See the U.S. Capitol, the White House, the Korean War Memorial, the Lincoln Memorial and many more sights.

**Day 15:** New Jersey
- Drive to New York City and visit the Shri Swaminarayan Mandir and have all-vegetarian cuisine to experience some traditional and authentic tastes of India.
- Proceed to visit the Statue of Liberty and take a ferry to Liberty Island to view the magnificent “Statue of Liberty”.

**Day 16:** New Jersey
- Visit SUMMIT One Vanderbilt, this observatory blends elements of art, technology, architecture, and thrill to take the concept of “observation deck” to entirely new heights.
- Experience New York’s iconic landmark the Times Square.

**Day 17:** New Jersey
- Proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end.

- A chance to enjoy Hot Air Ballooning.
- This morning you have an option to go for hot air ballooning (Boxed Breakfast).
- Later after an early breakfast at your hotel, we proceed to board the cruise to the Green Island.
- Escape into a world of surprises to experience the breathtaking beauty of the Great Barrier Reef.
- There is an abundance of activities for swimmers and non-swimmers to enjoy.
- A chance to Snorkel and dive, or you can stay dry and explore the stunning reef from the comfort of an air-conditioned semi-submersible that will take you to an underwater world that has a dazzling kaleidoscope of colours.
- Enjoy continental lunch on board the cruise.
- Return to your hotel with fantastic memories of this living natural wonder.
- Later in the evening visit Cairns night market on your own.

**Day 5:** Gold Coast
- Flight to Brisbane.
- Proceed towards Gold Coast – Australia’s entertainment capital.
- Enjoy Lunch Check into your hotel and later enjoy Indian Dinner walking distance to your hotel.

**Day 6:** Gold Coast
- Post breakfast enjoy a close encounter with Australia’s native animals at the Currumbin Wildlife Sanctuary, located on the Gold Coast.
- Admire critters such as the kangaroo, Tasmanian devil, koala, wombat, echidna and reptiles that live in natural-style bush and rainforest habitats.
- Walk through the stunning 5-acre forest of the Lost Valley and see unique flora and wildlife such as lemurs, red pandas, capybaras and other exotic reptiles.
- Later proceed to Sea World - the premier marine animal park on the Gold Coast, Queensland, Australia.
- The park includes rides, animal exhibits and other attractions.
- Enjoy a delicious dinner at a local Indian restaurant.

**Day 7:** Sydney
- Flight to Sydney – capital of New South Wales and one of Australia's largest cities.
- Explore the landmarks of Sydney - the Rocks area, Harbour Bridge, Bondi Beach on your exciting city tour.
- Enjoy dinner at an Indian Restaurant.

**Day 8:** Sydney
- After an American breakfast at the hotel, take a guided tour of one the world’s most spectacular landmark – the Sydney Opera House.
- Later visit the Sydney Tower to view the spectacular view of the city.
- Proceed for the guided Sydney Cricket Ground - A fascinating, behind the scenes walking tour of Sydney’s home of sport.
- Stand where the sporting heroes play cricket, rugby, football, and AFL.
- Hear entertaining stories of players, spectators, and events.
- Enjoy dinner at an Indian Restaurant.

**Day 9:** Sydney
- After buffet/boxed breakfast, we check out and proceed to the airport for your flight back home.
- Do spare a few minutes to share your feedback with your Tour Manager.
- Your valued suggestions will be most appreciated.
- Arrive home with pleasant memories of your Australian Extravaganza tour, which we are sure you will treasure for a lifetime.
