**Summary:** The 'Scenic New Zealand (Summer)' package is a 10-day tour covering Auckland, Rotorua, Queenstown, and Christchurch. The itinerary includes visits to Hobbiton movie set, Agrodome Sheep Show, Te Puia Thermal Reserve, Waitomo Glow Worm Caves, Milford Sound cruise, and more. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city tours, and visits to scenic attractions, among other activities. Meals and accommodations are included in the package.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Auckland
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Auckland: See the Opera House, Rathaus, St. Stephen’s Church, and more.

**Day 2:** Rotorua
- Drive to Rotorua and visit Hobbiton movie set.
- Enjoy a guided tour of Rotorua: See the Agrodome Sheep Show and Te Puia Thermal Reserve.

**Day 3:** Rotorua
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Rotorua: Visit the Agrodome Sheep Show and Te Puia Thermal Reserve.
- Learn the art of making beer at a microbrewery.

**Day 4:** Auckland
- Drive to Auckland and visit Waitomo Glow Worm Caves.
- Enjoy a guided tour of Auckland: See the SEA LIFE Kelly Tarlton's Aquarium and Sky Tower.

**Day 5:** Queenstown
- Drive to Queenstown and visit the Gondola ride that gives you the best view of this city.
- Enjoy the trilling Shotover Jet boat ride.

**Day 6:** Queenstown
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Queenstown: Visit the historic Arrowtown and visit bungy jump centre.
- Enjoy the Milford Sound cruise.

**Day 7:** Twizel
- Drive to Twizel / Omarama in the Mount Cook region.
- Visit Mrs Jone’s Fresh fruit stall and Puzzling World Wanaka.

**Day 8:** Christchurch
- Drive to Christchurch and visit the Mona Vale gardens and re-constructed CBD.
- Enjoy a city tour of Christchurch.

**Day 9:** Christchurch
- Proceed for a guided city tour of Christchurch: Visit the beautiful Church of Good Shepherd and Sheep Dog Monument.
- Enjoy a local lunch and dinner.

**Day 10:** Christchurch
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable All Of Kashmir with Gulmarg - Sonmarg - Doodhpathri' package is an 8-day tour covering Srinagar, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg. The itinerary includes visits to Dal Lake, Betab Valley, Aru Valley, Shalimar Bagh, Nishat Bagh, and other attractions. Participants will enjoy Shikara rides, Gondola rides, and visits to local markets, among other activities.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Srinagar
- Arrive at the Srinagar International Airport and meet the representative or driver.
- Proceed to the hotel or houseboat and check-in.
- Visit the Boulevard Road and take a 2-hour Shikara ride in Dal Lake.
- Enjoy a Kashmiri Kahwa with vegetables Pakora and a Kashmiri lunch on the lake.

**Day 2:** Srinagar to Pahalgam
- Drive to Pahalgam and visit the famous Mughal gardens of Nishat and Shalimar.
- Visit the Shankaracharya Temple situated on top of the Shankaracharya Hill in the Zabarwan Range in Srinagar.

**Day 3:** Pahalgam
- Visit the picturesque Betab valley & Aru Valley respectively.
- Enjoy a 3-hour walk or horseback (Own Cost) trip to the Thajwass glacier.

**Day 4:** Pahalgam to Srinagar
- Drive to Srinagar and visit the local market for some snacks or just pay a visit observing the local people going with their daily routine.

**Day 5:** Srinagar to Sonmarg
- Drive to Sonmarg and visit the majestic mountain resort.
- Take a 3-hour walk or horseback (Own Cost) trip to the Thajwass glacier.

**Day 6:** Srinagar to Gulmarg
- Drive to Gulmarg and board the Gondola cable car system.
- Ascend towards the Mountain range and click lots of photos (Own Cost) of the nearby mountain ranges.

**Day 7:** Srinagar to Doodhpathri
- Drive to Doodhpathri and visit the Valley of Milk.
- Enjoy a 3-hour walk or horseback (Own Cost) trip to the Thajwass glacier.

**Day 8:** Departure transfer to Airport
- Drive to the airport for your flight home.

**Summary:** The 'Grand Bargain New Zealand (Summer)' package is an 8-day tour covering Auckland, Queenstown, Rotorua, and other destinations in New Zealand. The itinerary includes visits to the Sky Tower, Waitomo Glow-worm Caves, Agrodome Sheep Show, and Te Puia Thermal Reserve, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city sightseeing, and visits to local markets and restaurants.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Auckland
- Arrive at Auckland airport and meet the Tour Manager / Local representative.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Enjoy an Indian dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 2:** Queenstown
- Fly to Queenstown and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy dinner at an Indian restaurant.

**Day 3:** Queenstown
- Proceed for a guided tour of Queenstown: Visit the Gondola ride and historic Arrowtown.
- Enjoy an Indian dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 4:** Rotorua
- Fly to Rotorua and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy a hot Indian dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 5:** Rotorua
- Proceed for a guided tour of Rotorua: Visit the Agrodome Sheep Show and Te Puia Thermal Reserve.
- Enjoy an Indian dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 6:** Rotorua
- Proceed for a guided tour of Rotorua: Visit the Maori Cultural show and enjoy some free time for shopping.
- Enjoy an Indian dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 7:** Auckland
- Fly to Auckland and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy a visit to the Sky Tower and enjoy some free time for shopping.
- Enjoy an Indian dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 8:** Auckland
- Proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Pure Croatia' package is an 8-day tour covering Zagreb, Plitvice Lakes, Split, and Dubrovnik. The itinerary includes visits to Cesky Krumlov Castle, Old Town Square, Astronomical Clock, Prague Castle, and Fisherman's Bastion, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Danube cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Zagreb
- Arrive at Zagreb Airport and transfer to hotel
- Enjoy a true spectacle of some of the most beautiful dances, songs and music from the rich heritage of Zagreb and its surrounding area.

**Day 2:** Zagreb
- Walking tour of Zagreb city center in a group
- Feel the pulse of the city and discover all the charm Zagreb has to offer.

**Day 3:** Plitvice Lakes
- Coach transfer from Zagreb to Plitvice lakes National park
- Become one with nature and embrace the stunning beauty of the waterfalls and the lakes that will surround you.

**Day 4:** Split
- Coach transfer from Plitvice National Park to Split
- Visit a massive Roman ruin complex and arguably the most important historical site in Split, Diocletian’s Palace.

**Day 5:** Split
- Walking tour of Split in a group
- Enjoy this amazing full-day speed boat tour and explore some of the most beautiful Adriatic islands.

**Day 6:** Dubrovnik
- Coach transfer from Split to Dubrovnik
- Enjoy a perfect evening with a beautiful sunset experience on a historical Karaka.

**Day 7:** Dubrovnik
- Walking tour of Dubrovnik in a group with Cable car ride tickets
- Find out how Dubrovnik people live nowadays, what they like to eat, how they like to be entertained, or what they cherish in life.

**Day 8:** Dubrovnik
- Departure transfer by private vehicle from Dubrovnik hotel to Dubrovnik airport.

**Summary:** The 'Customizable Kashmir - Heaven on Earth with Sonmarg Excursion' package is an 8-day tour covering Srinagar, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg. The itinerary includes visits to Dal Lake, Pahalgam, Betab Valley, Aru Valley, Gulmarg, and Sonmarg, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, Shikara rides, Gondola rides, and visits to Mughal gardens, trout farms, and local markets.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Srinagar
- Arrive at Srinagar International Airport
- Check-in at hotel or houseboat
- Visit Boulevard Road and take a 2-hour Shikara ride in Dal Lake

**Day 2:** Srinagar to Pahalgam
- Drive to Pahalgam (97 kilometers / 3-4 hrs drive)
- Visit the picturesque Betab Valley & Aru Valley respectively

**Day 3:** Pahalgam
- Visit the famous Mughal gardens of Nishat and Shalimar
- Visit the Shankaracharya Temple situated on top of the Shankaracharya Hill in the Zabarwan Range in Srinagar

**Day 4:** Pahalgam to Gulmarg
- Drive to Gulmarg (140 kilometers / 4 hrs drive)
- Visit the Gondola cable car system and ascend towards the Mountain range

**Day 5:** Gulmarg
- Visit the Thajwass glacier
- Visit the small town market for some snacks or just pay a visit observing the local people going with their daily routine

**Day 6:** Gulmarg to Srinagar
- Drive to Srinagar
- Visit the famous Mughal gardens of Nishat and Shalimar
- Visit the Shankaracharya Temple situated on top of the Shankaracharya Hill in the Zabarwan Range in Srinagar

**Day 7:** Srinagar to Sonmarg
- Drive to Sonmarg (Day Trip)
- Visit the Thajwass glacier
- Visit the small town market for some snacks or just pay a visit observing the local people going with their daily routine

**Day 8:** Departure transfer to Airport
- Drive to the airport for your flight home

**Summary:** The 'Customizable Kashmir Week' package is a 7-day tour covering Srinagar, Pahalgam, and Gulmarg. The itinerary includes visits to Dal Lake, Pahalgam City, Aru Valley, Betaab Valley, Chandanwari Valley, Shankaracharya Temple, Nishat Bagh, Shalimar Bagh, and more. Participants will enjoy shikara rides, guided tours, and visits to local markets and handicrafts. The package includes accommodation in mentioned or similar hotels, daily breakfast and dinner, and all transfers and sightseeing using A/c vehicle.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Srinagar
- Arrive in Srinagar
- Welcome onboard a wonderful tour to one of the most happening destinations - Kashmir!
- Transfer from Airport to Houseboat and check-in at the houseboat
- Enjoy shikara ride in Dal lake
- Overnight Stay at the Houseboat

**Day 2:** Pahalgam
- Srinagar – Pahalgam (94 Kms / approx 03 hrs)
- Drive through saffron fields; enroute Pampore. Stop by for a demonstration on Saffron cultivation
- Overnight Stay at the Hotel

**Day 3:** Pahalgam
- Pahalgam City Tour - Pahalgam is famous for its scenic beauty and is the jewel of the picturesque Liddar valley in the high Himalayas
- Enjoy ABC valley (Aru valley, Betaab valley, chandanwari valley - on direct payment basis & subject to Operation)
- Overnight Stay at the Hotel

**Day 4:** Gulmarg
- Pahalgam - Gulmarg (140 Kms / approx 04 hrs)
- En-route we visit Avantipur ruins and Kashmiri Cricket Bat Factory
- Upon arrival at Gulmarg check-in and Overnight Stay at the Hotel

**Day 5:** Gulmarg
- Gulmarg
- Enjoy Asia's Highest Cable Car Project Gulmarg Gondola - The Gondola offers all tourists, scenic views of Pir Panjal Mountains and Valley as you head towards Phase 1: KHILANMARG
- Overnight stay at hotel in Gulmarg

**Summary:** The 'Highlights of Europe (DISNEYLAND) (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering London, Paris, Belgium, Netherlands, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, and Italy. The itinerary includes visits to famous landmarks such as Buckingham Palace, Eiffel Tower, Disneyland Paris, Atomium, Keukenhof, and the Leaning Tower of Pisa, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, river cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to London
- Meet Tour Manager / Local Representative outside London Airport.
- Proceed to the hotel and check-in.
- Guided city tour of London: See the Buckingham Palace, Changing of King’s Guard, Big Ben, Westminster Abbey, Houses of Parliament, Trafalgar Square, Tower Bridge, and Thames River.

**Day 2:** London
- Proceed on a guided city tour of London: Visit Madame Tussauds wax museum.
- Enjoy a ride on the London Eye.

**Day 3:** Paris
- Drive to Calais by the Le Shuttle / Ferry and onwards drive to Paris.
- Guided City Tour of Paris: See the Alexander Bridge, Arc de Triomphe, Concorde Square, Opera House, Invalides, and Champs Elysees.

**Day 4:** Paris
- Proceed to Disneyland Paris where you can visit Disneyland Park OR Walt Disney Studios Park (Up to 5 Hour Visit).
- Visit the Eiffel Tower 2nd level.
- Enjoy a cruise on the Seine River along with an ‘Illumination Tour of Paris’ and see Paris by night, with some of the City’s famous monuments / sights lit up (Optional).

**Day 5:** Belgium
- Drive to Brussels for an Orientation Tour of Brussels: Enjoy free time at Grand Place with and see the famous Manneken Pis statue.
- Photo Stop at Atomium.

**Day 6:** Belgium
- Proceed to Keukenhof – the largest Spring Garden in the World.
- Enjoy a cruise on the canals of Amsterdam in a glass topped boat.

**Day 7:** Germany
- Drive to Cologne & visit the Cologne Cathedral.
- Enjoy a scenic cruise on the river Rhine.

**Day 8:** Switzerland
- Drive to the heart of the Black Forest, to enjoy the dense, evergreen forests and picturesque villages.
- Visit the Rhine Falls.

**Day 9:** Switzerland
- Day at leisure OR Visit to Jungfraujoch - The Top of Europe.
- Visit the Ice Palace and the Sphinx observatory deck to view the longest glacier in the Alps.
- Visit Interlaken.

**Day 10:** Switzerland
- Visit Mt Titlis. Our cable car ride includes the world’s first rotating cable car, the Rotair – to the top of Mt. Titlis at 3,020 meters.
- Do visit the “Cliff Walk” a suspension bridge along the cliff of Mt. Titlis.
- Visit the Square of Miracles to see the famous Leaning Tower of Pisa.

**Day 11:** Austria
- Drive to Innsbruck. En Route, visit Vaduz, the capital of Liechtenstein.
- Enjoy an orientation tour of Vaduz.
- Visit the Swarovski Crystal Museum and shop.
- Enjoy an Orientation Tour: See the Golden Roof and the Maria Theresien Strasse.

**Day 12:** Italy
- Drive to Italy & proceed to the pier to take a private boat to Venice.
- Visit St. Mark’s Square to see the Basilica, Doge’s Palace, Campanile, and Bridge of Sighs.

**Day 13:** Italy
- Proceed to Florence for a Guided walking Tour: see the Duomo, the Campanile, Baptistry with its Gates to the Paradise & Piazza Della Signoria.
- Visit the Vatican City – the smallest country in the world.
- Visit the holy Basilica of St. Peter’s and the St. Peter’s Square.

**Day 14:** Italy
- Day trip to Rome: Guided tour of Vatican & Rome: Enter the Vatican City – the smallest country in the world (shorts or sleeveless vests not allowed.
- Visit the Circus Maximus and photo-stop at Colosseum & Arc of Constantine.

**Day 15:** Italy
- Depart to Airport - Fly back home with Pleasant Memories!

**Summary:** The 'Australian Royale (Summer)' package is a 12-day tour covering Melbourne, Cairns, Fraser Island, Brisbane, and Sydney. The itinerary includes visits to the Great Ocean Road, Phillip Island, Kuranda, the Great Barrier Reef, Fraser Island, and Sydney's famous landmarks, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, scenic cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Melbourne
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Melbourne: See the Royal Botanical Gardens, Town Hall, St. Patrick’s Cathedral, National Tennis centre, the 1956 Olympic venue, the Shrine of Remembrance, Bourke Street Mall and some beautifully restored Victorian houses.

**Day 2:** Melbourne
- Enjoy a memorable excursion to the Great Ocean Road.
- Enjoy local lunch.
- Drive along the coastline of Port Campbell National Park. The coastline with its twisted shapes of amazing rock formation, the famous ‘Twelve Apostles’ – huge stone pillars rising from the surf, the Loch Ard Gorge.

**Day 3:** Melbourne
- Enjoy a memorable excursion to Phillip Island.
- Enjoy the brand new visitors centre, packed full of interesting displays on the adorable Little Penguins.
- Take some time to wander the paths and boardwalks for a chance to see penguins in their burrows.

**Day 4:** Cairns
- Flight to Cairns.
- Proceed to Kuranda – a World Heritage Rainforest.
- Experience one way Skyrail journey that immerses you in an intimate experience where you will relax and enjoy the stunning rainforest scenery, panoramic views of the Cairns tropical region and the glittering waters of the Coral Sea.

**Day 5:** Cairns
- Join us on an unforgettable experience to the Great Barrier Reef – the only living structure visible from the space.
- A chance to enjoy Hot Air Ballooning.
- Travel by air-conditioned catamaran from Cairns Marina to our Moore Reef Pontoon on the Outer Great Barrier Reef.

**Day 6:** Fraser Island
- Flight to Brisbane.
- Drive to Hervey Bay, Ferry to Fraser Islands (K’gari).
- With idyllic white beaches, endless sunshine, World Heritage wilderness to explore and spectacular sunsets across the bay, it’s the perfect place to stay and unwind on island time.

**Day 7:** Fraser Island
- Full day seat in coach 4WD tour of Fraser Island including buffet lunch, refreshments and National Park fees.
- Discover all of the below and more – SWIM WEAR IS COMPULSORY TODAY
- Gorgeous Lake McKenzie.
- Central Station and Wanggoolba Creek.
- Pile Valley’s awe-inspiring Satinay and Brush Box forests.
- 75 Mile Beach's famous highway.
- The Maheno shipwreck and the coloured sands of The Pinnacles.
- The relaxing fresh waters of Eli Creek.

**Day 8:** Brisbane
- Ferry back to Hervey Bay.
- Drive to Brisbane, visit Steve Irwin Australia Zoo with a Koala Photo and Orientation tour of Brisbane.
- Proceed to XXXX Brewery with Beer Tasting.

**Day 9:** Sydney
- Flight to Sydney - Showboat Dinner Cruise - Sydney Illuminated.
- Tonight, get set for a lifetime experience on board the spectacular Showboat dinner cruise.

**Day 10:** Sydney
- Explore the landmarks of Sydney - the Rocks area, Harbour Bridge, Bondi Beach on your exciting city tour + Lunch at Sydney Tower Revolving Restaurant.
- Enjoy a spectacular guided tour of the world-renowned Sydney Opera house.
- Fun filled Jet Boat ride.

**Day 11:** Sydney
- Day free explore Sydney on your own or visit the amazing Blue Mountains with Scenic Rides.
- Indian Dinner at an Indian Restaurant tonight.

**Day 12:** Sydney
- Fly back with pleasant memories.
- After buffet/boxed breakfast, we check out and proceed to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Adi Kailash Yatra' package is a 9-day tour covering Bhimtal, Pithoragarh, Dharchula, and Rudrapur. The itinerary includes visits to Bhimtal lake, Pithoragarh, Dharchula, and Rudrapur, with activities such as sightseeing, trekking, and visiting temples. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat rides, and visits to local markets. The tour also includes a visit to the Adi Kailash and Om Parvat, a sacred site for Hindus.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in New Delhi and drive to Bhimtal (270 Kms: 8 Hrs) (Altitude – 570 Mtrs)
- Arrive in New Delhi and drive to Bhimtal.
- Check in to the hotel and sightseeing of Bhimtal lake.
- Enjoy a boat ride at Bhimtal (Direct payment basis).
- Dinner and overnight at hotel.

**Day 2:** Bhimtal to Pithoragarh (200 Kms: 8 Hrs) (Altitude – 1627 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, check out from hotel and start your up hill journey to Pithoragarh.
- En-route to Pithoragarh visit Temple of Neem Karoli Baba at Kanchi Dham located on banks on river Kosi.
- After darshan and pooja, further drive for 80 Kms to reach Jageshwar Temple.
- Upon arrival, preform pooja at temple at the group of 125 Temples which is also a Jyotirlinga.
- Post pooja, enjoy your lunch at a nearby hotel in the lap of Nature.
- After having sumptuous lunch, drive 86 Kms and reach Pithoragarh.
- Upon arrival, check in at hotel.
- Rest of the evening is free to visit local market on foot.
- Dinner and overnight at hotel.

**Day 3:** Pithoragarh to Dharchula (95 Kms: 4 Hrs) (Altitude – 940 Mtrs)
- After early breakfast, drive to Dharchula.
- Upon arrival, complete your formalities for Inner line permits required for your onward trip.
- Later, check in at your guest house.
- Lunch at guest house.
- Rest of the day is free for exploring Dharchula and Nepal (Till 6 PM).
- At 7 PM in your guest house, assemble for tour briefing and meeting your guide for onward journey.
- Dinner and overnight stay at guest House.

**Day 4:** Dharchula to Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji (90 Kms: 7 Hrs/75 Kms: 5 Hrs/72 Kms: 5 Hrs) (Altitude – 3700 Mtrs/3250 Mtrs/3200 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, proceed to your base camp of Adi Kailash.
- We shall change your vehicle on this day and you would be resuming your journey on 4x4 wheel drive vehicle.
- The journey is off-roading on the dirt tracks in this Himalayan region where a lot of road construction is happening.
- At Chialekh, get your Inner line permits checked at ITBP & Army posts.
- Your inner line permits would be checked at Budhi, Napalchu, Kuti villages.
- You would come across some beautiful landscapes of the region where you can take numerous photos for your lifetime memories.
- Lunch at Buddhi Village.
- Further drive enroute driving past Villages of Gabriyang, Napalchu.
- As you are reaching altitude beyond 3000 meters, your pace must be slow and steady.
- Upon arrival at your base, check in your camps/guest house and relax for the day for acclimatization.
- Dinner and overnight stay at camps/guest house/Home stay.

**Day 5:** Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji to Aum Parvat – Nabhi/Gunji/Kuti/Jollynkong (30 Kms: 2 Hrs One Way) (Altitude – 3220 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, drive for approx. 2 Hrs to reach Nabhidhang village and from here witness AUM parvat.
- The Village Nabhidhang is the last village on this road and is 30 Kms from Lipula Pass and beyond Lipula pass is China.
- On a clear weather, you can witness Kailash Parwat from Sela pass.
- After a spectacular view, return back to your base camp entoute visit Kali Mata Mandir, Vyas Gufa.
- Rest of the day is free to relax and enjoy some time in the Himalayas by meditating.
- Dinner and overnight stay at camps/guest house/home stay.

**Day 6:** Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji/Jollynkong to Adi Kailash to Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji (20 Kms: 2 Hrs/65 Kms: 4 Hrs/68 Kms: 4 Hrs) (Altitude - 4770 Mtrs)
- This is the day that you embark on the JOURNEY OF LIFE TIME to witness Adi Kailash – ABODE OF SHIVA.
- After an early breakfast, commence your journey to reach village Jollykong enroute drive past Pandava Fort, Pandava Parvat, Parvati Mukut.
- From Jolly kong, the last road head from here you will start your pad yatra to Kailash Parvati temple, Parwati Sarovar.
- You can also do parikrama of the sarovar.
- The trek is approx. 4 Kms trek and further trek to Gaurikund and also witness Bhim ki Kethi.
- A lot of folk tales of the area will give you an insight of the valley.
- After your darshan, return back to base at Jollykong and drive to Kuti/Nabhi/Gunji.
- Dinner and overnight stay at camps/guest house/Home stay.

**Day 8:** Pithoragarh to Rudrapur (235 Kms:8 Hrs) (Altitude – 119 Mtrs)
- After breakfast, check out & drive to Rudrapur enroute visit Advaita Ashram.
- Later, drive to reach Rudrapraur.
- Check in at Hotel.
- Relax for the day at a luxurious Hotel before end of the trip.
- Dinner and Overnight stay.

**Day 9:** Rudrapur to New Delhi (Hrs 265 Kms: 7 Hrs)
- After breakfast, you are on your last lap of your journey.
- Drive back to your respective departure destination with pious memories of Adi Kailash & Om Parvat Yatra.

**Summary:** The 'Vietnam With Da Nang - Ex Kolkata Special' package is a 9-day tour covering Ho Chi Minh City, Danang, and Hanoi. The itinerary includes visits to Cu Chi Tunnels, Mekong Delta, Ba Na Hills, Golden Bridge, Hoi An Ancient Town, and Ha Long Bay, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, boat cruises, and visits to local markets and handicraft workshops.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Ho Chi Minh City
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.

**Day 2:** Ho Chi Minh City

- Visit the Mekong Delta and enjoy a boat cruise on the mighty Mekong River.

**Day 3:** Danang
- Fly to Danang and visit the Hoi An Ancient Town.
- Explore the narrow lanes lined with centuries-old houses influenced by Chinese, Japanese, French and European architecture.
- Visit the 400-year old Japanese Covered Bridge and Phuc Kien Assembly Halls.

**Day 4:** Danang
- Visit the Ba Na Hills and take a cable car to the top.
- Explore the Old Villas, French Stable, and Tinh Tam Garden.
- Visit the Linh Ung Pagoda and see the 27-meter high Buddha statue.

**Day 5:** Danang
- Visit the Fantasy Park and enjoy the rollercoaster ride.
- Visit the Linh Chua Linh Tu Temple and explore the Buddhist culture.
- Lunch at a local restaurant.

**Day 6:** Ha Long Bay

- Explore the stalactites in the Surprise Cave and hike the mountain path of Ti Top Island.
- Enjoy a cooking course and make Vietnamese Nem.

**Day 7:** Ha Long Bay
- Visit the Loaun Cave and enjoy the Tai Chi course on the sundeck.
- Paddle a kayak through the emerald water and unveil the amazing wonders of Ha Long Bay.

**Day 8:** Hanoi

- Visit the Temple of Literature and explore the gardens and well-preserved architecture.
- Enjoy a Vietnamese Coffee with a Snack or Pastry.

**Day 9:** Hanoi
- Visit the Ho Chi Minh Complex and see the Ba Dinh Square and Ho Chi Minh’s Mausoleum.
- Visit the One Pillar Pagoda and explore the Hanoi Old Quarter by a “cyclo” visit.
- Enjoy a Water Puppet Show at Thang Long Theatre.
- Late check-out and transfer to the airport for the departure flight.

**Summary:** The 'Funfilled Florida and Bahamas Cruise (Summer 2024)' package is a 10-day tour covering Miami, Orlando, and the Bahamas. Participants will enjoy guided tours, cruises, and visits to theme parks and attractions. Meals and accommodations are included in the package.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Miami
- Arrive in Miami and check-in at the hotel.
- Rest of the day is free for you to explore the city on your own.

**Day 2:** Miami City Tour, Biscayne Bay Cruise and Everglades Airboat Ride
- After breakfast, proceed for a hop on and hop off city tour of Miami.
- Enjoy a sightseeing open top double decker tour through the city and explore beautiful South Beach, the historic Art Deco District, and downtown Miami.

**Day 3:** Miami - Orlando

- Day free to explore the city on your own.

**Day 4:** Visit Sea World

- See the Polar bears at close quarters at the Wild Arctic - and bring home memories of a lifetime!

**Day 5:** Visit Epcot at Walt Disney World
- Today, step into a world of fantasy as you proceed to Visit the popular Walt Disney’s Epcot - It’s the ultimate mix of futuristic technology and entertainment.
- There are fun-filled hands-on activities that will appeal to the junior and seniors both.

**Day 6:** Visit to "NASA" - Kennedy Space Centre Visitors Complex

- Visit space exploration, space shuttle simulators, enjoy 3D shows at IMAX Theater and see Space shuttle Atlantis up close.
- Later get on a bus tour and visit Launch Complex, site of many Apollo and space shuttle launches.

**Day 7:** Get set to board your Royal Caribbean cruise ‘Allure Of The Seas’ to the Bahamas!
- Departure Time: 16:00 hrs.
- Today, proceed to the port to board your cruise.
- Enjoy your stay in the Ocean View cabins.

**Day 8:** An opportunity for fun in the sun as you visit the Coco Cay Island!
- Today, you can either enjoy the luxury onboard the cruise or explore the many shore activities which the cruise has to offer or just play and relax on the Coco Cay Island beach.

**Day 9:** Enjoy entertainment onboard. Arrive into Nassau - the capital of the Bahamas.
- Today, arrive into Nassau the historic and beautiful island.
- You can either join the several optional shore excursions or just walk along the ‘Bay Street’ and explore shopping.
- You also have a chance to visit Paradise Island and see the glamorous Atlantis Hotel.

**Day 10:** Bid farewell
- Today, proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end.
- Please do spare a few moments of your valuable time to write and share with us your wonderful experience.

- Today, we proceed our tour in Vancouver, starting with the view of Shannon falls. Later, visit the Capilano Park and take a walk over the famous suspension bridge. Next proceed on a guided city tour of Vancouver, visit Stanley Park, Canada Place and view the famous steam clock while driving through historic Gastown. Later experience the ‘FlyOver Canada’, a breath-taking flight simulation ride that will whisk you away on an exhilarating journey across Canada.

**Day 3:** Victoria
- Board the British Columbia Ferry and sail through the Active Pass and Gulfs Islands to Victoria.
- Visit the beautiful Butchart Gardens, the 55 acres of beautiful garden haven, overflowing with lush greens and colourful blooms.
- Next, proceed on a panoramic tour of Victoria, see the Royal British Columbia Museum, Victoria’s Inner Harbor and the Parliament Building.

**Day 4:** Alaskan Cruise
- Drive to Vancouver port to board your Royal Caribbean Cruise ‘Brilliance Of The Seas’ to Alaska.
- Enjoy your stay in Inside stateroom cabins.

**Day 5:** Scenic Cruising the Inside Passage
- This day the guests have all by themselves where they can sit at the deck or at any part of the open area of the ship and enjoy the falling glaciers.
- Keep your cameras and camcorders ready with you to capture some of the rarest moments to see and believe.

**Day 6:** Tracy Arm Fjords and Glacier
- The ship sails through the most popular spot of Alaska that is the Tracy Arm Fjords.
- The ship takes a halt for half an hour or so for you to capture those melting Glaciers in your camera and camcorder.

**Day 7:** Hubbard Glacier (Cruising)
- Overnight on board the cruise.

**Day 8:** Ketchikan, Alaska
- We have half day at Ketchikan and our guests can choose to walk around the port or take one of our recommended shore excursions.
- Its Tlingit Indian name, Kach Khanna, means “spread wings of the eagle.”

**Day 9:** Cruising
- This day the guests have all by themselves where they can sit at the deck or at any part of the open area of the ship and enjoy the falling glaciers.
- Keep your cameras and camcorders ready with you to capture some of the rarest moments to see and believe.

**Day 10:** Cruising
- This day the guests have all by themselves where they can sit at the deck or at any part of the open area of the ship and enjoy the falling glaciers.
- Keep your cameras and camcorders ready with you to capture some of the rarest moments to see and believe.

**Day 11:** Bid farewell to all the friends you made and return home with great memories from this magnificent part of the world.
- Today, disembark from the cruise at Vancouver ports and proceed to the airport on your own as your memorable tour comes to an end.

**Summary:** The 'European Dreams - Senior Citizen Special (Summer 2024)' package is a 15-day tour covering London, Paris, Belgium, Netherlands, Germany, Switzerland, Austria, Italy, and the UK. The itinerary includes visits to famous landmarks such as Buckingham Palace, Eiffel Tower, Madame Tussauds Wax Museum, and the Leaning Tower of Pisa, among other attractions. **Summary:** The 'Korea Extravaganza with Jeju Island (Summer)' package is a 10-day tour covering Seoul, Busan, and Jeju Island. **Summary:** The 'Fantastic South Korea' package is an 8-day tour covering Seoul, Jeonju, Yeosu, Gyeongju, and Pyeongchang. The itinerary includes visits to Gyeongbokgung Palace, Korean Folk Village, JeonjuHanok Village, May 18th National Cemetery, Suncheon Bay Garden, and the Historic Site of Admiral Yi Sun-sin's Path, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city visits, and experiences of Korean culture and history.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Seoul
- Arrive at Incheon International Airport.
- Transfer to hotel and check-in.
- Rest of the day is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Seoul
- Enjoy breakfast in hotel.
- Proceed for a Seoul city tour: Visit Gyeongbokgung Palace, Royal Guard Changing Ceremony, National Folk Museum, and Korean Ginseng Center.
- Visit Korean Folk Village and experience the culture of the late Joseon Dynasty.

**Day 3:** Seoul to Jeonju
- Drive to Jeonju (130Km/1.5hours) and visit The Tomb of King Muryeong (UNESCO) and Gongsanseong Fortress (UNESCO).
- Check-in to hotel and have leisure time.

**Day 4:** Jeonju to Yeosu
- Drive to Yeosu (80Km/1hr) and visit JeonjuHanok Village, including about 700 traditional Korean houses called Hanok.
- Visit May 18th National Cemetery, Suncheon Bay Garden, and the Historic Site of Admiral Yi Sun-sin's Path.

**Day 5:** Yeosu to Gyeongju
- Drive to Gyeongju (100Km/1.5hrs) and visit Jinjuseong Fortress, historically linked to Japanese invasion in 1592.
- Visit Busan's largest seafood market, Jagalchi Fishery Market, and Haeundae Beach.

**Day 6:** Gyeongju to Pyeongchang
- Drive to Pyeongchang (234km/2.5hrs) and visit Seokguram Grotto (UNESCO) and Bulguksa Temple (UNESCO).
- Visit AndongHahoe Folk Village, which has preserved the housing architecture and the village structure of the Joseon Dynasty.

**Day 7:** Pyeongchang to Seoul
- Visit the venue of 2018 Winter Olympic Games (Ski Jumping stadium, Not Tower).
- Proceed to Mt. Seorak National Park (UNESCO) and visit the peaks of the Seoraksan Mountains.

**Day 8:** Departure
- Transfer to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Ladakh Veg Special' package is a 7-day tour covering Leh, Nubra Valley, and Pangong Lake. The itinerary includes visits to Hall of Fame, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib, and Sangam, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, ATV rides, and visits to local markets and villages. The package includes daily breakfast and dinner, as well as three lunches, and is priced at 48000.0. The package includes assistance on arrival, accommodation on twin sharing basis, daily veg breakfast and dinner, daily veg lunches, and entrance tickets to monuments. The package also includes a professional tour manager, evening bonfire at Nubra, gala dinner on the 6th day, ATV ride once only, and inner line permits. The package excludes air fares, additional/personal use of vehicle, and any personal expenses. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival Leh
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Enjoy simple & light lunch today at your respective hotels.

**Day 2:** Sham Valley Tour - Hall Of Fame, Magnetic Hill, Gurudwara Pathar Sahib & Sangam
- After breakfast, we will drive alongside bank of Indus river till Sangam, to witness the the conflicts of Zanskar river and Indus River.
- En-route we will be visiting Gurdwara Pathar Sahib, Magnetic Hill (where the cars defy gravity) and Hall of Fame (which has a museum of the Kargil War memorabilia).

**Day 3:** Leh To Khardung La To Nubra Valley
- Today post breakfast check out of the hotel & we will start our journey to Nubra Valley through Khardungla, which is the World's highest motor able road at 18,832 feet above sea level.
- At Khardungla pass the snow-capped peaks and the mountain views are amazing.

**Day 4:** Nubra - Excursion To Turtuk - Nubra
- One of the moist fascinating journeys in Ladakh this is a less popular destination recently opened for tourist, if you have a thirst for a beautiful location this is the place.
- En-route spectacular mountain ranges and Villages like.

**Day 5:** Nubra To Pangong (165 Kms / Approx 06 Hrs)
- After breakfast, leave for Pangong Lake at 14, 500 ft. via Agham & Shyok village and reach Pangong Lake.
- Pangong, the highest salt water lake in the world.

**Day 6:** Pangong To Leh (160 Kms / Approx 06 Hrs)
- After sunrise, enjoy your early breakfast and check out of the camp and drive back to Leh.
- En-route visit Thiksey Monastery, located on a hill-lock with formidable views of the Indus valley.

**Day 7:** Departure From Leh
- Transfer to Leh airport to board the flight back for onward journey with beautiful memories.

**Summary:** The 'Explore Mongolia' package is a 9-day tour that takes you through the vast and breathtaking landscapes of Mongolia. The itinerary includes visits to the Mongol Nomadic Camp, Urguu Ger Camp, Secret of Ongi Ger Camp, Gobi Mirage Ger Camp, and Gobi Erdene Ger Camp, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, horseback riding, camelback riding, and visits to historical sites such as the Erdene Zuu Monastery and the Flaming Cliffs. The tour also includes a flight to Ulaanbaatar and a city tour, where you can visit the National History Museum and enjoy a traditional music and dance performance.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Ulaanbaatar
- Welcome to Ulaanbaatar – The coldest capital in the World!
- Check in at Ger Camp (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.)
- Rest of the day is at leisure.

**Day 2:** Mongol Nomadic Camp
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Visit the Mongol Nomadic Camp for a captivating 'nomadic show' that highlights the customs of traditional Mongolian nomads.
- Visit Hustai National Park, where you can observe the last wild horse species, the Przewalski horse, freely roaming in their natural habitat.
- Enjoy horseback riding and dinner.

**Day 3:** Urguu Ger Camp
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Drive to Orkhon River Valley, a UNESCO World Heritage Site.
- Visit the renowned Erdene Zuu Monastery, a historic landmark founded in 1586 and the very first Buddhist monastery in Central Mongolia.
- Explore the Museum of Karakorum, which provides valuable insights into the history of Central Mongolia & the mighty Mongol Empire.

**Day 4:** Secret of Ongi Ger Camp
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Drive south to Ongi Monastery ruins by the Ongi river.
- Visit the ruins of the historical Ongi Monastery (18th century) with some short hiking.
- Return to the ger camp and rest.

**Day 5:** Gobi Mirage Ger Camp
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Drive to Bayanzag, also known as the Flaming Cliffs.
- Visit the Khavtsgait Petroglyph located in Boginiin Khyar ridge at Gurvan Saikhan Mountain (1–2-hour hike).
- Explore the area where dinosaur bones and eggs were found.

**Day 6:** Gobi Erdene Ger Camp
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Drive to the Khongor Sand Dunes, also known as the Singing Dunes.
- Hike up to the beautiful sand dunes (2-3 hours trekking).
- Explore the Khongor river streaming through the sands.
- Enjoy 1-hour camelback riding.

**Day 7:** Gobi Mirage Ger Camp
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Drive towards the Gobi Gurvan Saikhan National Park /aka the Three Beauty National Park/.
- Visit the park while watching wildlife including pika, other bird species and plants.
- Return to the ger camp and rest.

**Day 8:** Ulaanbaatar
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Catch a flight to Ulaanbaatar in the morning.
- Visit Sukhbaatar Square, and the National History Museum.
- Enjoy a traditional music & dance performance by the magical Tumen Ekh ensemble.
- Farewell dinner at a local restaurant.

**Day 9:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

- After Buffet Breakfast, proceed for day excursion to Sonmarg - Golden Meadow. Sonmarg lies in Sind Valley streamed with flowers and surrounded by mountains.
- Sonmarg is also the base for some interesting treks to the high altitude of Himalayan Lakes. Enjoy riding on a pony up to Thajiwas Glacier (on direct payment basis & subject to Operation) or Sledge Riding on snow (on direct payment).

**Day 7:** Fly Back Home
- Today after breakfast, transfer to Srinagar airport to board the return flight with Happy Memories!!!
